            '<i data-lucide="check" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i> Enviar Orçamento';
          nextBtn.classList.add("btn-submit-style");
        } else {
          nextBtn.innerHTML =
            'Próximo <i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i>';
          nextBtn.classList.remove("btn-submit-style");
        }
        if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // ============================================
      // NAVIGATION LOGIC
      // ============================================
      function navigateToStep(targetStep) {
        if (targetStep === currentStep) return;
        if (targetStep < 1 || targetStep > totalSteps) return;

        // When going backwards, just go
        if (targetStep < currentStep) {
          currentStep = targetStep;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          return;
        }

        // Going forward: validate each intermediate step
        for (let i = currentStep; i < targetStep; i++) {
          const valid = validateStep(i);
          if (!valid) {
            currentStep = i;
            renderCurrentStep();
            showValidationErrorsInChat(i);
            return;
          }
          stepValidated[`step${i}`] = true;
        }

        // §17 Reality Check — only block on errors that belong to steps up to targetStep.
        // Errors from later steps (e.g. compartment temperature in step 3) must not
        // block forward navigation from step 1 → 2.
        if (typeof runRealityCheck === 'function') {
          const rc = runRealityCheck();
          if (rcHasBlockingForStep(rc, targetStep)) {
            const errs = rcIssuesUpToStep(rc, targetStep)
              .filter(it => it.level === 'error')
              .slice(0, 5)
              .map(it => `• [Etapa ${rcIssueStep(it)} · ${it.category}] ${it.message}`)
              .join('\n');
            const blockingCount = rcIssuesUpToStep(rc, targetStep).filter(it => it.level === 'error').length;
            addChatMessage(
              `🚫 **Navegação bloqueada até a Etapa ${targetStep}.** Reality Check detectou ${blockingCount} erro(s) crítico(s) em etapas ≤ ${targetStep}:\n\n${errs}`,
              'system',
              'has-errors',
            );
            refreshRcSidebar();
            return;
          }
        }

        currentStep = targetStep;
        renderCurrentStep();
        scrollWizardTop();
      }

      let isSubmitting = false; // Prevent double-click

      async function advanceStep() {
        // Sync DOM → formData before validating (prevents stale-state bugs)
        syncFormFromDOM();

        // Validate current step (local validation)
        const valid = validateStep(currentStep);
        if (!valid) {
          renderCurrentStep(); // Re-render with error styles
          showValidationErrorsInChat(currentStep);
          return;
        }

        stepValidated[`step${currentStep}`] = true;

        // Disable button while AI validates
        const btnNext = document.getElementById("btnNext");
        btnNext.disabled = true;
        btnNext.style.opacity = '0.6';

        // §17 Reality Check — BLOCK advancement only if there are errors
        // belonging to steps up to currentStep (errors from later steps are
        // expected to be unresolved and must not block earlier navigation).
        if (typeof runRealityCheck === 'function') {
          const rc = runRealityCheck();
          if (rcHasBlockingForStep(rc, currentStep)) {
            btnNext.disabled = false;
            btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
            const list = rcIssuesUpToStep(rc, currentStep).filter(i => i.level === 'error');
            const errs = list.slice(0, 5).map(i => `• [Etapa ${rcIssueStep(i)} · ${i.category}] ${i.message}`).join('\n');
            addChatMessage(
              `🚫 **Não é possível avançar.** O Reality Check detectou ${list.length} erro(s) crítico(s) na Etapa ${currentStep} (ou anteriores):\n\n${errs}\n\nCorrija ou use "Aplicar correção" no painel "📊 Análise" antes de prosseguir.`,
              'system',
              'has-errors',
            );
            refreshRcSidebar();
            return; // DO NOT advance, DO NOT call AI
          }
        }

        // AI validation (BLOCKING if critical errors found)
        const aiResult = await aiValidateStep(currentStep);

        btnNext.disabled = false;
        btnNext.style.opacity = '1';

        // If AI found critical errors (🔴), BLOCK advancement
        if (aiResult && aiResult.hasCriticalErrors) {
          addChatMessage(
            '🚫 **Não é possível avançar.** A validação IA identificou problemas críticos (🔴) que precisam ser corrigidos antes de prosseguir. Revise os campos destacados acima.',
            'system',
          );
          return; // DO NOT advance
        }

        // Advance (OK or only warnings)
        if (currentStep < totalSteps) {
          currentStep++;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          saveToStorage();
        }
      }

      function showValidationErrorsInChat(stepNum) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const errors = validationErrors[stepKey] || {};
        const allErrors = Object.values(errors)
          .flatMap(v => Array.isArray(v) ? v : []) // ignora objetos aninhados (ex.: _portas)
          .map(e => (typeof e === 'string' ? e : (e && e.message) || JSON.stringify(e)));
        if (allErrors.length > 0) {
          const msg = `⚠️ **Corrija os erros na Etapa ${stepNum}:**\n\n${allErrors.map((e) => `• ${e}`).join("\n")}`;
          addChatMessage(msg, "system");
        }
      }

      function scrollWizardTop() {
        document
          .querySelector(".wizard-area")
          .scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
      }

      // ============================================
      // SUBMIT WIZARD
      // ============================================
      async function submitWizard() {
        // Prevent double submissions
        if (isSubmitting) return;
        isSubmitting = true;

        // Sync current step DOM → formData before validating
        syncFormFromDOM();

        // Enforce representante for non-admin users (prevent DOM tampering)
        if (!isAdmin()) {
          const userName = currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser?.email || '';
          formData.step1.representante = userName;
        }

        const btnNext = document.getElementById("btnNext");
        btnNext.disabled = true;
        btnNext.style.opacity = '0.6';

        // Validate ALL steps locally before submitting
        let allValid = true;
        let firstErrorStep = null;

        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          if (!validateStep(i)) {
            allValid = false;
            if (!firstErrorStep) firstErrorStep = i;
          } else {
            stepValidated[`step${i}`] = true;
          }
        }

        if (!allValid) {
          currentStep = firstErrorStep;
          renderCurrentStep();
          showValidationErrorsInChat(firstErrorStep);
          addChatMessage(
            "❌ Há erros pendentes em etapas anteriores. Corrija-os antes de enviar.",
            "system",
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
          return;
        }

        // ====== AI VALIDATE STEP 6 BEFORE SUBMITTING ======
        const aiResult = await aiValidateStep(currentStep);
        if (aiResult && aiResult.hasCriticalErrors) {
          addChatMessage(
            '🚫 **Não é possível enviar.** A validação IA identificou problemas críticos (🔴) na Etapa 6 que precisam ser corrigidos antes do envio.',
            'system',
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
          return;
        }

        // ====== §17 REALITY CHECK BLOCK ======
        const rc = runRealityCheck();
        if (rc.blocking) {
          const errs = rc.issues.filter(i => i.level === 'error').slice(0, 5)
            .map(i => `• ${i.message}`).join('\n');
          addChatMessage(
            `🚫 **Submissão bloqueada pelo Reality Check.** Há ${rc.counts.error} erro(s) crítico(s):\n\n${errs}\n\nVeja o painel "Análise da Câmara" no canto inferior direito.`,
            'system',
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
          refreshRcSidebar();
          return;
        }
        if (rc.derived.fit_score < 50) {
          if (!(await uiConfirm(`Fit Score baixo (${rc.derived.fit_score}/100). Há avisos importantes não resolvidos. Deseja enviar mesmo assim?`, { variant: 'warning', confirmText: 'Enviar mesmo assim' }))) {
            isSubmitting = false;
            btnNext.disabled = false;
            btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
            return;
          }
        }

        // ====== SUBMIT TO BACKEND ======
        const badge = document.getElementById("aiValidatingBadge");
        badge.querySelector("span").textContent = "Enviando orçamento...";
        badge.classList.add("show");

        try {
          const response = await fetch(WIZARD_SUBMIT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              formData: formData,
              sessionId: currentSessionId,
              submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
              submittedBy: getUser(),
              userRole: getUserRole(),
              version: "1.0",
            }),
          });

          if (response.ok) {
            let result = {};
            try {
              result = await response.json();
            } catch (e) {}
            const protocol = result.protocol || '';
            addChatMessage(
              `✅ **Orçamento enviado com sucesso!**\n\n${protocol ? "📋 Protocolo: **" + protocol + "**\n\n" : ""}${result.message || 'Dados registrados.'}`,
              "ai-validation",
            );

            // ====== RESET WIZARD FOR NEW SUBMISSION ======
            setTimeout(() => {
              clearFormStorage();
              formData = {};
              validationErrors = {};
              stepValidated = {};
              aiValidationResults = {};
              localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
              currentStep = 1;
              initFormData();
              renderCurrentStep();
              renderValidationTracker();
              addChatMessage(
                `📝 **Novo orçamento iniciado.** O formulário foi limpo para um novo preenchimento.${protocol ? ' O protocolo anterior é: ' + protocol : ''}`,
                'system',
              );
            }, 2000); // Small delay so user can read the success message

          } else {
            const errText = await response.text().catch(() => "");
            addChatMessage(
              `❌ Falha ao enviar orçamento (${response.status}). ${errText || 'Servidor não retornou detalhes.'}`,
              "system",
            );
          }
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("Submit error:", error);
          addChatMessage(
            "❌ Erro de conexão ao enviar. Verifique sua rede e tente novamente.",
            "system",
          );
        } finally {
          badge.classList.remove("show");
          badge.querySelector("span").textContent = "IA analisando...";
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = '1';
          isSubmitting = false;
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // CHAT FUNCTIONALITY
      // ============================================
      function stripChatContext(text) {
        if (!text) return text;
        // Remove [CONTEXTO DO WIZARD] and everything after it
        return text.replace(/\s*\[CONTEXTO[^\]]*\].*$/s, '').trim();
      }

      function addChatMessage(content, type = "assistant", extraClass = "") {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        content = stripChatContext(content);
        if (!content) return; // skip empty messages after stripping
        const msg = document.createElement("div");
        msg.className = `chat-msg ${type} ${extraClass}`.trim();

        const div = document.createElement("div");
        div.className = "msg-content";
        div.innerHTML = marked.parse(content);
        msg.appendChild(div);

        chatMessages.appendChild(msg);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;

        // Auto-open chat if closed for important messages.
        // No mobile (≤ 900px) só abrimos automaticamente quando a mensagem é
        // BLOQUEANTE (extraClass === 'has-errors' ou começa com 🚫), porque o
        // chat ocupa a tela inteira. Para avisos normais, mostramos um badge
        // pulsante no botão do chat.
        const isMobile = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 900px)').matches;
        const isBlocking = extraClass === 'has-errors' || /^🚫/.test(content);
        const panel = document.getElementById("chatPanel");
        const isClosed = panel && !panel.classList.contains("open");
        if (isClosed && (type === "ai-validation" || type === "system")) {
          if (!isMobile || isBlocking) {
            toggleChat();
          } else {
            // Sinaliza ao usuário que há nova mensagem importante no chat
            const btn = document.getElementById("chatToggleBtn");
            if (btn) btn.classList.add('has-unread');
          }
        }
      }

      async function sendChatMessage(message) {
        if (!message.trim()) return;
        addChatMessage(message, "user");

        // Ensure we have a session
        if (!currentSessionId) {
          currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        }

        // Show typing indicator
        showTypingIndicator();

        try {
          const response = await fetch(AGENT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              chatInput: message,
              sessionId: currentSessionId,
              wizardValidation: false, // Flag: save to DB for session memory
              context: JSON.stringify({
                wizardStep: currentStep,
                stepName: SCHEMA[`step${currentStep}`].title,
                currentFormData: formData,
              }),
            }),
          });

          removeTypingIndicator();

          if (response.ok) {
            const data = await response.json();
            addChatMessage(
              data.output || data.message || "Sem resposta do agente.",
              "assistant",
            );
            // Refresh sessions list after new message
            debouncedFetchSessions();
          } else {
            addChatMessage(
              "Erro ao consultar o assistente. Tente novamente.",
              "system",
            );
          }
        } catch (error) {
          removeTypingIndicator();
          addChatMessage("Falha de conexão com o assistente.", "system");
        }
      }

      function showTypingIndicator() {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        const existing = chatMessages.querySelector('.chat-msg.typing');
        if (existing) return; // already showing
        const msg = document.createElement("div");
        msg.className = "chat-msg typing";
        msg.innerHTML = '<div class="typing-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>';
        chatMessages.appendChild(msg);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
      }

      function removeTypingIndicator() {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        const typing = chatMessages.querySelector('.chat-msg.typing');
        if (typing) typing.remove();
      }

      function toggleChat() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("chatPanel");
        const btn = document.getElementById("chatToggleBtn");
        panel.classList.toggle("open");
        btn.classList.toggle("active");
        // Limpa o sinal de "não-lido" ao abrir
        if (panel.classList.contains("open")) {
          btn.classList.remove("has-unread");
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // SESSION MANAGEMENT
      // ============================================
      let sessionsFetchTimeout = null;

      function debouncedFetchSessions() {
        clearTimeout(sessionsFetchTimeout);
        sessionsFetchTimeout = setTimeout(() => loadSessions(), 2000);
      }

      async function loadSessions() {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_list_sessions');
          if (error) { console.warn('Failed to load sessions:', error.message); return; }
          sessions = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
          renderSessions();
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to load sessions:', e);
        }
      }

      async function loadSessionHistory(sessionId) {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_get_history', { p_session_id: sessionId });
          if (error || !data) return [];
          return data.map(item => {
            if (item.message) {
              return {
                role: item.message.type === 'human' ? 'user' : 'assistant',
                content: stripChatContext(item.message.content || ''),
                timestamp: item.created_at,
              };
            }
            return item;
          });
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to load history:', e);
          return [];
        }
      }

      async function deleteSessionById(sessionId) {
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_delete_session', { p_session_id: sessionId });
          return !error;
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to delete session:', e);
          return false;
        }
      }

      function renderSessions() {
        const list = document.getElementById('sessionsList');
        if (!sessions || sessions.length === 0) {
          list.innerHTML = '<div class="sessions-loading">Nenhuma sessão encontrada</div>';
          return;
        }
        list.innerHTML = sessions.map(s => {
          const isActive = s.session_id === currentSessionId;
          const title = s.titulo || s.session_id?.substring(0, 30) || 'Sessão sem título';
          const date = s.data_ultimo ? new Date(s.data_ultimo).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR') : '';
          const msgs = s.total_mensagens || 0;
          return `
            <div class="session-item ${isActive ? 'active' : ''}" data-session-id="${s.session_id}">
              <div class="session-item-info" onclick="switchSession('${s.session_id}')">
                <div class="session-item-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</div>
                <div class="session-item-meta">${date} · ${msgs} msgs</div>
              </div>
              <button class="session-delete-btn" onclick="handleDeleteSession('${s.session_id}', event)" title="Excluir sessão">
                <i data-lucide="trash-2" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          `;
        }).join('');
        if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      }

      async function switchSession(sessionId) {
        currentSessionId = sessionId;
        renderSessions();

        // Clear chat and load history
        const chatEl = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
        chatEl.innerHTML = '<div class="sessions-loading">Carregando histórico...</div>';

        const history = await loadSessionHistory(sessionId);
        chatEl.innerHTML = '';

        if (history.length === 0) {
          addChatMessage('📭 Sessão vazia. Envie uma mensagem para começar.', 'system');
        } else {
          history.forEach(msg => {
            addChatMessage(msg.content, msg.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'assistant');
          });
        }

        // Close sessions panel
        document.getElementById('sessionsPanel').style.display = 'none';
      }

      async function handleDeleteSession(sessionId, event) {
        event.stopPropagation();
        if (!(await uiConfirm('Excluir esta sessão e todo seu histórico?', { danger: true, confirmText: 'Excluir' }))) return;

        const success = await deleteSessionById(sessionId);
        if (success) {
          sessions = sessions.filter(s => s.session_id !== sessionId);
          renderSessions();
          if (currentSessionId === sessionId) {
            currentSessionId = null;
            document.getElementById('chatMessages').innerHTML = '';
            addChatMessage('🗑️ Sessão excluída. Crie uma nova sessão para continuar.', 'system');
          }
        } else {
          uiAlert('Falha ao excluir sessão.', { variant: 'error' });
        }
      }

      function startNewSession() {
        currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        document.getElementById('chatMessages').innerHTML = '';
        addChatMessage('🆕 **Nova sessão criada!** Envie mensagens ou avance no wizard para interagir com o assistente.', 'system');
        document.getElementById('sessionsPanel').style.display = 'none';
        renderSessions();
      }

      function toggleSessionsPanel() {
        const panel = document.getElementById('sessionsPanel');
        if (panel.style.display === 'none') {
          panel.style.display = 'block';
          loadSessions();
        } else {
          panel.style.display = 'none';
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // UTILITY FUNCTIONS
      // ============================================
      // ============================================
      // CPF / CNPJ Mask & Validation
      // ============================================
      function maskCpfCnpj(value) {
        let digits = (value || '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 14);
        if (digits.length <= 11) {
          // CPF: 000.000.000-00
          digits = digits.slice(0, 11);
          if (digits.length > 9) return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,2})/, '$1.$2.$3-$4');
          if (digits.length > 6) return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2.$3');
          if (digits.length > 3) return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2');
          return digits;
        } else {
          // CNPJ: 00.000.000/0000-00
          if (digits.length > 12) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{4})(\d{1,2})/, '$1.$2.$3/$4-$5');
          if (digits.length > 8) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,4})/, '$1.$2.$3/$4');
          if (digits.length > 5) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2.$3');
          if (digits.length > 2) return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{1,3})/, '$1.$2');
          return digits;
        }
      }

      function validateCpf(cpf) {
        const digits = cpf.replace(/\D/g, '');
        if (digits.length !== 11) return false;
        // Reject known invalid sequences
        if (/^(\d)\1{10}$/.test(digits)) return false;
        // First check digit
        let sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * (10 - i);
        let rest = (sum * 10) % 11;
        if (rest === 10) rest = 0;
        if (rest !== parseInt(digits[9])) return false;
        // Second check digit
        sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * (11 - i);
        rest = (sum * 10) % 11;
        if (rest === 10) rest = 0;
        return rest === parseInt(digits[10]);
      }

      function validateCnpj(cnpj) {
        const digits = cnpj.replace(/\D/g, '');
        if (digits.length !== 14) return false;
        if (/^(\d)\1{13}$/.test(digits)) return false;
        const weights1 = [5,4,3,2,9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2];
        const weights2 = [6,5,4,3,2,9,8,7,6,5,4,3,2];
        let sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * weights1[i];
        let rest = sum % 11;
        const d1 = rest < 2 ? 0 : 11 - rest;
        if (parseInt(digits[12]) !== d1) return false;
        sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 13; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * weights2[i];
        rest = sum % 11;
        const d2 = rest < 2 ? 0 : 11 - rest;
        return parseInt(digits[13]) === d2;
      }

      function validateCpfCnpj(value) {
        const digits = (value || '').replace(/\D/g, '');
        if (digits.length === 11) return validateCpf(digits);
        if (digits.length === 14) return validateCnpj(digits);
        return false; // incomplete
      }

      function escapeHtml(text) {
        const div = document.createElement("div");
        div.textContent = text || "";
        return div.innerHTML;
      }

      function escapeAttr(text) {
        return (text || "")
          .replace(/&/g, "&")
          .replace(/"/g, """)
          .replace(/'/g, "'")
          .replace(/</g, "<")
          .replace(/>/g, ">");
      }

      // ============================================
      // STYLED MODAL DIALOGS (replaces native alert/confirm)
      // ============================================
      function _uiDialog({ title, message, variant = 'info', confirmText = 'OK', cancelText = null, danger = false }) {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
          const overlay = document.createElement('div');
          overlay.className = 'ui-dialog-overlay';
          overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,23,42,0.62);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;animation:uiDialogFadeIn 0.15s ease-out;';
          const accent = danger ? '#dc2626'
                       : variant === 'warning' ? '#f97316'
                       : variant === 'success' ? '#16a34a'
                       : variant === 'error'   ? '#dc2626'
                       : 'var(--color-primary, #0ea5e9)';
          const icon  = danger ? '⚠️'
                       : variant === 'warning' ? '⚠️'
                       : variant === 'success' ? '✅'
                       : variant === 'error'   ? '🔴'
                       : variant === 'question' ? '❓'
                       : 'ℹ️';
          const safeMsg = String(message || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
          const safeTitle = String(title || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>');
          overlay.innerHTML = `
            <div class="ui-dialog" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" style="background:var(--bg-card,#1e293b);color:var(--text-primary,#f1f5f9);border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);width:92%;max-width:440px;overflow:hidden;animation:uiDialogScaleIn 0.18s ease-out;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#334155);">
              <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;padding:20px 22px 12px;align-items:flex-start;border-top:4px solid ${accent};">
                <div style="font-size:28px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;">${icon}</div>
                <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
                  ${title ? `<h3 style="margin:0 0 6px;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary,#f1f5f9);">${safeTitle}</h3>` : ''}
                  <div style="font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);">${safeMsg}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;padding:14px 22px 18px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.12);">
                ${cancelText ? `<button class="ui-dialog-cancel" style="padding:9px 16px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#475569);color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;">${cancelText}</button>` : ''}
                <button class="ui-dialog-ok" style="padding:9px 18px;background:${accent};border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;box-shadow:0 2px 6px ${accent}55;">${confirmText}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
          document.body.appendChild(overlay);
          const close = (val) => { overlay.remove(); document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey); resolve(val); };
          const onKey = (e) => {
            if (e.key === 'Escape') close(cancelText ? false : true);
            if (e.key === 'Enter') close(true);
          };
          document.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
          overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay && cancelText) close(false); });
          overlay.querySelector('.ui-dialog-ok').addEventListener('click', () => close(true));
          const cancelBtn = overlay.querySelector('.ui-dialog-cancel');
          if (cancelBtn) cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', () => close(false));
          setTimeout(() => overlay.querySelector('.ui-dialog-ok').focus(), 50);
        });
      }
      function uiAlert(message, opts = {}) {
        return _uiDialog({
          title: opts.title || null,
          message,
          variant: opts.variant || (opts.error ? 'error' : 'info'),
          confirmText: opts.confirmText || 'OK',
        });
      }
      function uiConfirm(message, opts = {}) {
        return _uiDialog({
          title: opts.title || null,
          message,
          variant: opts.variant || 'question',
          confirmText: opts.confirmText || 'Confirmar',
          cancelText: opts.cancelText || 'Cancelar',
          danger: !!opts.danger,
        });
      }
      // Multi-button choice dialog.
      // opts.choices = [{ value, label, variant?, primary? }]
      // Returns the selected `value` or null if dismissed.
      function uiChoice(message, opts = {}) {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
          const overlay = document.createElement('div');
          overlay.className = 'ui-dialog-overlay';
          overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,23,42,0.62);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;animation:uiDialogFadeIn 0.15s ease-out;';
          const variant = opts.variant || 'question';
          const accent = variant === 'warning' ? '#f97316'
                       : variant === 'success' ? '#16a34a'
                       : variant === 'error'   ? '#dc2626'
                       : 'var(--color-primary, #0ea5e9)';
          const icon  = variant === 'warning' ? '⚠️'
                       : variant === 'success' ? '✅'
                       : variant === 'error'   ? '🔴'
                       : variant === 'question' ? '❓'
                       : 'ℹ️';
          const safeMsg = String(message || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/\n/g,'<br>');
          const safeTitle = String(opts.title || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>');
          const choices = Array.isArray(opts.choices) ? opts.choices : [];
          const btnHtml = choices.map((c, i) => {
            const cAccent = c.variant === 'danger' ? '#dc2626'
                          : c.variant === 'warning' ? '#f97316'
                          : c.variant === 'success' ? '#16a34a'
                          : c.variant === 'neutral' ? 'transparent'
                          : accent;
            const isOutline = c.variant === 'neutral';
            const style = isOutline
              ? `padding:9px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#475569);color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;`
              : `padding:9px 14px;background:${cAccent};border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 6px ${cAccent}55;`;
            return `<button data-choice-idx="${i}" style="${style}">${String(c.label || '').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<')}</button>`;
          }).join('');
          const checkboxHtml = opts.rememberLabel
            ? `<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);margin-right:auto;cursor:pointer;"><input type="checkbox" class="ui-dialog-remember" style="margin:0;"> ${String(opts.rememberLabel).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<')}</label>`
            : '';
          overlay.innerHTML = `
            <div class="ui-dialog" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" style="background:var(--bg-card,#1e293b);color:var(--text-primary,#f1f5f9);border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);width:92%;max-width:520px;overflow:hidden;animation:uiDialogScaleIn 0.18s ease-out;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#334155);">
              <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;padding:20px 22px 12px;align-items:flex-start;border-top:4px solid ${accent};">
                <div style="font-size:28px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;">${icon}</div>
                <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
                  ${opts.title ? `<h3 style="margin:0 0 6px;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;">${safeTitle}</h3>` : ''}
                  <div style="font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);">${safeMsg}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;align-items:center;padding:14px 22px 18px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.12);flex-wrap:wrap;">
                ${checkboxHtml}
                ${btnHtml}
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
          document.body.appendChild(overlay);
          const close = (val) => {
            const cb = overlay.querySelector('.ui-dialog-remember');
            const remember = !!(cb && cb.checked);
            overlay.remove();
            document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey);
            resolve({ value: val, remember });
          };
          const onKey = (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') close(null); };
          document.addEventListener('keydown', onKey);
          overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) close(null); });
          overlay.querySelectorAll('[data-choice-idx]').forEach((btn) => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
              const idx = parseInt(btn.dataset.choiceIdx, 10);
              close(choices[idx] ? choices[idx].value : null);
            });
          });
        });
      }
      // Keep on window for use from inline onclick handlers
      window.uiAlert = uiAlert;
      window.uiConfirm = uiConfirm;
      window.uiChoice = uiChoice;

      // ============================================
      // AUTHENTICATION (Supabase)
      // ============================================
      let currentUser = null;
      let appStarted = false;

      function getAuthHeaders() {
        // Try to get token from authStorage (robust: works in iframes, sandboxed contexts)
        const headers = {};
        try {
          const raw = authStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);
          if (raw) {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
            const token = parsed?.access_token || parsed?.session?.access_token;
            if (token) headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${token}`;
          }
        } catch {}
        // Always include user ID if available
        if (currentUser?.id) {
          headers['x-user-id'] = currentUser.id;
        }
        return headers;
      }

      function generateSessionId() {
        const id = `session-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
        currentSessionId = id;
        return id;
      }

      async function checkAuth() {
        try {
          const { data: { session } } = await sbClient.auth.getSession();
          if (session && session.user) {
            // Verify company_name
            const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
            if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
              await sbClient.auth.signOut();
              showLogin();
              return;
            }
            currentUser = session.user;
            hideLogin();
            startApp();
          } else {
            showLogin();
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Auth check failed:', e);
          showLogin();
        }
      }

      // Listen for auth state changes
      sbClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
        if (event === 'SIGNED_IN' && session?.user) {
          const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
          if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
            sbClient.auth.signOut();
            return;
          }
          currentUser = session.user;
          hideLogin();
          startApp();
        } else if (event === 'SIGNED_OUT') {
          currentUser = null;
          showLogin();
        }
      });

      function showLogin() {
        document.getElementById("loginOverlay").style.display = "flex";
        document.getElementById("appContainer").style.display = "none";
        if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === 'function') refreshRcSidebar();
      }
      function hideLogin() {
        document.getElementById("loginOverlay").style.display = "none";
        document.getElementById("appContainer").style.display = "flex";
        if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === 'function') setTimeout(refreshRcSidebar, 100);
      }

      function getUser() {
        if (currentUser) return currentUser.email || currentUser.id;
        return 'unknown';
      }

      function getUserRole() {
        if (!currentUser) return 'usuario';
        return currentUser.user_metadata?.role || 'usuario';
      }

      function isAdmin() {
        return getUserRole() === 'admin';
      }

      document.getElementById("loginForm").addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const email = document.getElementById("usernameInput").value.trim();
        const pass = document.getElementById("passwordInput").value;
        const errorEl = document.getElementById("loginError");
        const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');

        btn.disabled = true;
        btn.textContent = 'Entrando...';
        errorEl.style.display = "none";

        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
            email: email,
            password: pass,
          });

          if (error) {
            errorEl.textContent = error.message === 'Invalid login credentials'
              ? 'E-mail ou senha inválidos'
              : error.message;
            errorEl.style.display = "block";
          } else if (data.user) {
            // Check company_name
            const meta = data.user.user_metadata || {};
            if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
              await sbClient.auth.signOut();
              errorEl.textContent = 'Usuário não pertence a esta empresa.';
              errorEl.style.display = "block";
            }
            // Auth state change listener will handle the rest
          }
        } catch (err) {
          errorEl.textContent = 'Erro de conexão. Tente novamente.';
          errorEl.style.display = "block";
        } finally {
          btn.disabled = false;
          btn.textContent = 'Entrar';
        }
      });

      // ============================================
      // THEME TOGGLE
      // ============================================
      function initTheme() {
        const saved = localStorage.getItem("wizard_theme") || "light";
        document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-theme", saved);
        updateThemeIcon(saved);
      }

      function toggleTheme() {
        const current = document.documentElement.getAttribute("data-theme");
        const next = current === "dark" ? "light" : "dark";
        document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-theme", next);
        localStorage.setItem("wizard_theme", next);
        updateThemeIcon(next);
      }

      function updateThemeIcon(theme) {
        const iconEl = document.getElementById("navThemeIcon");
        const labelEl = document.getElementById("navThemeLabel");
        if (iconEl) {
          iconEl.setAttribute("data-lucide", theme === "dark" ? "sun" : "moon");
        }
        if (labelEl) {
          labelEl.textContent = theme === "dark" ? "Tema Claro" : "Tema Escuro";
        }
        if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // Sidebar toggle
      function openSidebar() {
        document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.add('open');
        document.getElementById('sidebarOverlay').classList.add('open');
        updateSidebarUser();
      }
      function closeSidebar() {
        document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
        document.getElementById('sidebarOverlay').classList.remove('open');
      }
      function updateSidebarUser() {
        if (!currentUser) return;
        const name = currentUser.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser.email || '';
        const role = currentUser.user_metadata?.role || 'usuário';
        document.getElementById('sidebarUserName').textContent = name;
        document.getElementById('sidebarUserRole').textContent = role;
        document.getElementById('sidebarAvatar').textContent = (name[0] || 'U').toUpperCase();
        // Show users nav for admin
        if (isAdmin()) {
          document.getElementById('navUsers').style.display = 'flex';
          document.getElementById('navDbSetup').style.display = 'flex';
        }
      }

      document.getElementById('sidebarOpenBtn').addEventListener('click', openSidebar);
      document.getElementById('sidebarCloseBtn').addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);
      document.getElementById('sidebarOverlay').addEventListener('click', closeSidebar);

      document.getElementById('navEditProfile').addEventListener('click', () => {
        closeSidebar();
        showEditProfilePanel();
      });
      document.getElementById('navTheme').addEventListener('click', () => {
        toggleTheme();
      });
      document.getElementById('navSubmissions').addEventListener('click', () => {
        closeSidebar();
        showSubmissionsPanel();
      });
      document.getElementById('navUsers').addEventListener('click', () => {
        closeSidebar();
        showAdminPanel();
      });
      document.getElementById('navResetForm').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (!(await uiConfirm('Tem certeza que deseja limpar TODOS os dados do formulário? Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.', { danger: true, confirmText: 'Limpar tudo' }))) return;
        closeSidebar();
        clearFormStorage();
        formData = {};
        validationErrors = {};
        stepValidated = {};
        aiValidationResults = {};
        localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
        currentStep = 1;
        initFormData();
        renderCurrentStep();
        renderValidationTracker();
        addChatMessage('🗑️ Formulário resetado. Todos os dados foram apagados.', 'system');
      });
      document.getElementById('navResetRag').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (!(await uiConfirm('Resetar todo o histórico do chat IA? As mensagens da sessão atual serão apagadas.', { danger: true, confirmText: 'Resetar' }))) return;
        closeSidebar();
        // Clear chat messages from UI
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
        if (chatMessages) chatMessages.innerHTML = '';
        // Start new session
        currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        addChatMessage('🔄 Histórico IA resetado. Nova sessão iniciada.', 'system');
      });
      document.getElementById('navDbSetup').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (!(await uiConfirm('Isso vai RESETAR o banco de dados e refazer todo o RAG.\n\nTodos os dados de orçamentos e chat serão perdidos. Deseja continuar?', { danger: true, title: 'ATENÇÃO', confirmText: 'Continuar' }))) return;
        if (!(await uiConfirm('Esta ação é IRREVERSÍVEL. Tem certeza absoluta?', { danger: true, title: 'ÚLTIMA CONFIRMAÇÃO', confirmText: 'Sim, resetar tudo' }))) return;
        closeSidebar();
        addChatMessage('🔄 Iniciando reset do banco de dados e reconstrução do RAG...', 'system');
        try {
          const res = await fetch(DB_SETUP_URL, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...getAuthHeaders() },
            body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'full_reset', triggeredBy: getUser(), timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }),
          });
          if (res.ok) {
            const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
            addChatMessage(`✅ **Database Reset concluído!**\n\n${data.message || 'Banco recriado e RAG reconstruído com sucesso.'}`, 'ai-validation');
          } else {
            const errText = await res.text().catch(() => '');
            addChatMessage(`❌ Falha no reset (${res.status}). ${errText}`, 'system');
          }
        } catch (err) {
          addChatMessage(`❌ Erro de conexão ao resetar DB: ${err.message}`, 'system');
        }
      });
      document.getElementById('navLogout').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        closeSidebar();
        await sbClient.auth.signOut();
        currentUser = null;
        currentSessionId = null;
        location.reload();
      });

      initTheme();

      // ============================================
      // EVENT BINDINGS
      // ============================================
      document.getElementById("btnPrev").addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (currentStep > 1) {
          currentStep--;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          saveToStorage();
        }
      });

      document.getElementById("btnNext").addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (currentStep === totalSteps) {
          submitWizard();
        } else {
          advanceStep();
        }
      });

      document
        .getElementById("chatToggleBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", toggleChat);
      document
        .getElementById("chatCloseBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", toggleChat);
      document
        .getElementById("sessionsToggleBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", toggleSessionsPanel);
      document
        .getElementById("newSessionBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", startNewSession);

      document.getElementById("chatSendBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
        const input = document.getElementById("chatInput");
        sendChatMessage(input.value);
        input.value = "";
      });

      document.getElementById("chatInput").addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
        if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          document.getElementById("chatSendBtn").click();
        }
      });

      // ============================================
      // APP INITIALIZATION
      // ============================================

      /**
       * Setup representante field:
       * - Admin: loads list of all company users as options
       * - Regular user: auto-fills with their own name (read-only)
       */
      async function setupRepresentanteField() {
        const field = SCHEMA.step1.fields.representante;

        if (isAdmin()) {
          // Admin sees a list of all users
          try {
            const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_list_users');
            if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {
              field.options = data
                .filter(u => u.confirmed)
                .map(u => u.full_name || u.email);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn('Falha ao carregar lista de representantes:', e);
          }
          field.readOnly = false;
        } else {
          // Regular user: always force their own name, read-only
          const userName = currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser?.email || '';
          field.options = [userName];
          field.readOnly = true;

          // Always overwrite with current name (prevents impersonation)
          formData.step1.representante = userName;
          saveToStorage();
        }
      }

      async function startApp() {
        if (appStarted) return;
        appStarted = true;

        // Generate session ID if none exists
        if (!currentSessionId) {
          currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        }

        // Ensure IBGE estados are loaded before rendering (needed for step 2+)
        await fetchIbgeEstados();

        // Populate representante field based on role
        await setupRepresentanteField();

        startHealthCheck();
        renderCurrentStep();
        loadSessions(); // Load session list

        // Update sidebar user info
        updateSidebarUser();

        // Welcome message in chat
        const hasSavedData = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
        if (hasSavedData) {
          addChatMessage(
            '🔄 **Dados restaurados!** Seus dados foram recuperados do último preenchimento. Continue de onde parou ou use o menu lateral para limpar.',
            'system',
          );
        } else {
          addChatMessage(
            "👋 **Bem-vindo ao Wizard de Orçamento!**\n\nSou o assistente de validação. A cada etapa que você avançar, vou analisar suas respostas e verificar se estão tecnicamente corretas.\n\nCampos marcados com **PLANILHA** são críticos — serão inseridos diretamente na planilha de cálculo.\n\nSeus dados são salvos automaticamente. Se recarregar a página, eles estarão aqui.\n\nUse este chat para tirar dúvidas a qualquer momento.",
            "system",
          );
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // ADMIN PANEL (User Management)
      // ============================================
      async function showAdminPanel() {
        if (!isAdmin()) return;
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.id = 'adminOverlay';
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10000;';
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:650px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <h2 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Gerenciar Usuários</h2>
              <button onclick="closeAdminPanel()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:20px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div id="adminUsersList" style="margin-bottom:16px;">Carregando...</div>
            <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);padding-top:16px;">
              <h3 style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;">Criar Novo Usuário</h3>
              <form id="createUserForm" style="display:grid;gap:10px;">
                <input type="email" id="newUserEmail" placeholder="E-mail" required style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <input type="text" id="newUserName" placeholder="Nome completo" style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <input type="password" id="newUserPass" placeholder="Senha" required minlength="6" style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <select id="newUserRole" style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                  <option value="usuario">Usuário</option>
                  <option value="visualizador">Visualizador</option>
                  <option value="admin">Administrador</option>
                </select>
                <button type="submit" style="padding:10px;background:var(--color-primary);color:white;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Criar Usuário</button>
              </form>
              <div id="createUserMsg" style="margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;display:none;"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) closeAdminPanel(); });

        // Load users
        await loadAdminUsers();

        // Create user form
        document.getElementById('createUserForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          const email = document.getElementById('newUserEmail').value.trim();
          const name = document.getElementById('newUserName').value.trim();
          const pass = document.getElementById('newUserPass').value;
          const role = document.getElementById('newUserRole').value;
          const msgEl = document.getElementById('createUserMsg');

          try {
            const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc('saorafael_create_user', {
              p_email: email,
              p_password: pass,
              p_full_name: name,
              p_role: role,
            });
            if (error) throw error;
            msgEl.style.display = 'block';
            msgEl.style.color = 'var(--color-success)';
            msgEl.textContent = '✅ Usuário ' + email + ' criado com sucesso!';
            document.getElementById('createUserForm').reset();
            await loadAdminUsers();
          } catch (err) {
            msgEl.style.display = 'block';
            msgEl.style.color = 'var(--color-error)';
            msgEl.textContent = '❌ ' + (err.message || 'Erro ao criar usuário');
          }
        });
      }

      function closeAdminPanel() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById('adminOverlay');
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
      }

      // ==================== SUBMISSIONS PANEL ====================
      async function showSubmissionsPanel() {
        const admin = isAdmin();
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.id = 'submissionsOverlay';
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10000;';
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;width:95%;max-width:900px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <h2 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">
                ${admin ? '📋 Todos os Orçamentos' : '📋 Meus Orçamentos'}
              </h2>
              <button onclick="closeSubmissionsPanel()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:20px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            ${admin ? `
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <select id="filterStatus" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" style="padding:8px 12px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <option value="">Todos Status</option>
                <option value="submitted">📝 Submetido</option>
                <option value="processing">⏳ Processando</option>
                <option value="completed">✅ Concluído</option>
                <option value="error">❌ Erro</option>
              </select>
              <input type="text" id="filterSearch" onkeyup="applySubmissionFilters()" placeholder="Buscar protocolo, cliente, vendedor..." style="flex:1;min-width:180px;padding:8px 12px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <input type="date" id="filterDateFrom" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" title="Data inicial" style="padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <input type="date" id="filterDateTo" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" title="Data final" style="padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
            </div>
            ` : ''}
            <div id="submissionsBulkBar" style="display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;">
              <span id="submissionsSelectedCount" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">0 selecionado(s)</span>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                <button onclick="exportSelectedSubmissions('csv')" style="padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📥 CSV</button>
                <button onclick="exportSelectedSubmissions('xlsx')" style="padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📊 Excel</button>
                <button onclick="clearSubmissionSelection()" style="padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">Limpar</button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;">
              <button onclick="exportAllSubmissions('csv')" style="padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--color-success);color:var(--color-success);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📥 Exportar Todos (CSV)</button>
              <button onclick="exportAllSubmissions('xlsx')" style="padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--color-info);color:var(--color-info);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📊 Exportar Todos (Excel)</button>
            </div>
            <div id="submissionsContent" style="font-size:13px;">Carregando...</div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) closeSubmissionsPanel(); });

        await loadSubmissions();
      }

      function closeSubmissionsPanel() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById('submissionsOverlay');
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
      }

      let allSubmissions = [];
      let selectedSubmissionIds = new Set();

      async function loadSubmissions() {
        const contentEl = document.getElementById('submissionsContent');
        if (!contentEl) return;
        try {
          let query = sbClient
            .from('saorafael_wizard_submission')
            .select('*')
            .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false });

          // RLS handles visibility, but for non-admin we explicitly filter
          if (!isAdmin()) {
            query = query.eq('user_id', currentUser.id);
          }

          const { data, error } = await query;
          if (error) throw error;
          allSubmissions = data || [];
          renderSubmissionsTable(allSubmissions);
        } catch (err) {
          contentEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--color-error);">Erro ao carregar orçamentos: ' + escapeHtml(err.message) + '</p>';
        }
      }

      function applySubmissionFilters() {
        const status = document.getElementById('filterStatus')?.value || '';
        const search = (document.getElementById('filterSearch')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
        const dateFrom = document.getElementById('filterDateFrom')?.value || '';
        const dateTo = document.getElementById('filterDateTo')?.value || '';

        let filtered = [...allSubmissions];

        if (status) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.status === status);
        }
        if (search) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => {
            const fd = s.form_data || {};
            const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
            const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
            const searchStr = [
              s.protocol || '',
              s2.razao_social || '',
              s1.representante || '',
              s1.tipo_produto || '',
              s2.cidade || '',
              s.notes || '',
            ].join(' ').toLowerCase();
            return searchStr.includes(search);
          });
        }
        if (dateFrom) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) >= dateFrom);
        }
        if (dateTo) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(s => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) <= dateTo);
        }

        renderSubmissionsTable(filtered);
      }

      function renderSubmissionsTable(submissions) {
        const contentEl = document.getElementById('submissionsContent');
        if (!contentEl) return;

        if (!submissions || submissions.length === 0) {
          contentEl.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:24px;">Nenhum orçamento encontrado.</p>';
          return;
        }

        const statusBadge = (status) => {
          const map = {
            submitted: { icon: '📝', label: 'Submetido', color: 'var(--color-info)' },
            processing: { icon: '⏳', label: 'Processando', color: 'var(--color-warning)' },
            completed: { icon: '✅', label: 'Concluído', color: 'var(--color-success)' },
            error: { icon: '❌', label: 'Erro', color: 'var(--color-error)' },
          };
          const s = map[status] || { icon: '❓', label: status || 'Desconhecido', color: 'var(--text-secondary)' };
          return `<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;background:${s.color}15;color:${s.color};">${s.icon} ${s.label}</span>`;
        };

        const formatDate = (iso) => {
          if (!iso) return '—';
          const d = new Date(iso);
          return d.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR') + ' ' + d.toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
        };

        const admin = isAdmin();

        let html = `
          <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
            <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;">
              <thead>
                <tr style="border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-color);text-align:left;">
                  <th style="padding:10px 6px;width:30px;text-align:center;"><input type="checkbox" id="subSelectAll" onchange="toggleSelectAllSubmissions(this.checked)" style="cursor:pointer;"></th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Protocolo</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Data</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Tipo</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Cliente</th>
                  ${admin ? '<th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Vendedor</th>' : ''}
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Status</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);text-align:center;">Ações</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
        `;

        submissions.forEach((sub, idx) => {
          const fd = sub.form_data || {};
          const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
          const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
          const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
          const isChecked = selectedSubmissionIds.has(sub.id);
          html += `
            <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);${idx % 2 === 0 ? '' : 'background:var(--bg-tertiary);'}" id="sub-row-${sub.id}">
              <td style="padding:10px 6px;text-align:center;"><input type="checkbox" class="sub-checkbox" data-sub-id="${sub.id}" ${isChecked ? 'checked' : ''} onchange="toggleSubmissionSelection(${sub.id}, this.checked)" style="cursor:pointer;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:600;color:var(--color-primary);font-family:monospace;">${escapeHtml(sub.protocol || '—')}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-secondary);white-space:nowrap;">${formatDate(sub.submitted_at)}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(s1.tipo_produto || '—')}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(s2.razao_social || '—')}</td>
              ${admin ? `<td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${escapeHtml(s1.representante || '—')}</td>` : ''}
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;">${statusBadge(sub.status)}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;">
                <button onclick="toggleSubmissionDetail(${sub.id})" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Detalhes</button>
                <button onclick="duplicateSubmissionAsBase(${sub.id})" title="Duplicar como base para novo orçamento" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-warning);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;margin-left:4px;">Duplicar</button>
                ${admin ? `<button onclick="deleteSubmission(${sub.id}, '${escapeAttr(sub.protocol || '')}')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-error);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;margin-left:4px;">Excluir</button>` : ''}
              </td>
            </tr>
            <tr id="sub-detail-${sub.id}" style="display:none;">
              <td colspan="${admin ? 8 : 7}" style="padding:0;">
                <div style="padding:16px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;margin:4px 8px 12px 8px;">
                  ${renderSubmissionDetail(sub)}
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
          `;
        });

        html += '</tbody></table></div>';
        html += `<p style="margin-top:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:right;">${submissions.length} orçamento(s) encontrado(s)</p>`;
        contentEl.innerHTML = html;
        updateSubmissionBulkBar();
      }

      function renderSubmissionDetail(sub) {
        const fd = sub.form_data || {};
        const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
        const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
        const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
        const s4 = fd.step4 || {};
        const s5 = fd.step5 || {};
        const s6 = fd.step6 || {};
        const compartimentos = s6.compartimentos || [];
        const sections = [];

        // Helper: only add if has value
        const add = (arr, label, val, suffix) => {
          if (val !== undefined && val !== null && val !== '') {
            arr.push([label, suffix ? val + suffix : val]);
          }
        };

        // ===== Step 1: Dados Comerciais =====
        const comercial = [];
        add(comercial, 'Representante', s1.representante);
        add(comercial, 'Origem Contato', s1.origem_contato);
        add(comercial, 'Tipo Produto', s1.tipo_produto);
        add(comercial, 'Comissão Rep.', s1.comissao_representante, '%');
        add(comercial, 'Comissão Vend.', s1.comissao_vendedor, '%');
        add(comercial, 'Obs. Comerciais', s1.observacoes_comerciais);
        if (comercial.length) sections.push({ title: '💼 Dados Comerciais', items: comercial });

        // ===== Step 2: Cadastro e Logística =====
        const cadastro = [];
        add(cadastro, 'Razão Social', s2.razao_social);
        add(cadastro, 'CNPJ/CPF', s2.cnpj_cpf);
        add(cadastro, 'Inscrição Estadual', s2.inscricao_estadual);
        add(cadastro, 'Endereço Entrega', s2.endereco_entrega);
        add(cadastro, 'Cidade', s2.cidade);
        add(cadastro, 'Estado', s2.estado);
        add(cadastro, 'CEP', s2.cep);
        add(cadastro, 'Local Instalação', s2.local_instalacao_municipio);
        add(cadastro, 'Resumo Técnico', s2.dados_tecnicos_resumo);
        add(cadastro, 'Contato', s2.contato_nome);
        add(cadastro, 'Telefone', s2.contato_telefone);
        add(cadastro, 'E-mail', s2.contato_email);
        add(cadastro, 'Exigência Faturamento', s2.exigencia_faturamento);
        add(cadastro, 'Prazo Pagamento', s2.prazo_pagamento);
        if (cadastro.length) sections.push({ title: '👤 Cadastro & Logística', items: cadastro });

        // ===== Step 3: Especificações Construtivas =====
        const espec = [];
        add(espec, 'Comprimento', s3.comprimento, 'm');
        add(espec, 'Largura', s3.largura, 'm');
        add(espec, 'Altura', s3.altura, 'm');
        if (s3.comprimento && s3.largura) {
          const area = (parseFloat(s3.comprimento) * parseFloat(s3.largura)).toFixed(1);
          const vol = s3.altura ? (parseFloat(s3.comprimento) * parseFloat(s3.largura) * parseFloat(s3.altura)).toFixed(1) : null;
          espec.push(['Área', area + 'm²']);
          if (vol) espec.push(['Volume', vol + 'm³']);
        }
        add(espec, 'Tipo Isolamento', s3.tipo_isolamento);
        add(espec, 'Espessura Painel', s3.espessura_painel, 'mm');
        add(espec, 'Revest. Interno', s3.revestimento_interno);
        add(espec, 'Revest. Externo', s3.revestimento_externo);
        add(espec, 'Cor Revestimento', s3.cor_revestimento);
        add(espec, 'Piso', s3.piso);
        add(espec, 'Iluminação', s3.iluminacao);
        add(espec, 'Qtd Luminárias', s3.qtd_luminarias);
        if (espec.length) sections.push({ title: '📐 Especificações Construtivas', items: espec });

        // ===== Step 4: Acessórios e Fechamentos =====
        const portas = [];
        // Portas[] (preferred) or legacy single porta
        const portasArr = Array.isArray(s4.portas) ? s4.portas : [];
        if (portasArr.length > 0) {
          portasArr.forEach((p, i) => {
            const tag = p.compartimento_id ? `${p.compartimento_id}` : `Porta ${i + 1}`;
            if (p.tipo) portas.push([`${tag} · Tipo`, p.tipo]);
            if (p.largura) portas.push([`${tag} · Largura`, p.largura + 'mm']);
            if (p.altura) portas.push([`${tag} · Altura`, p.altura + 'mm']);
            if (p.parede) portas.push([`${tag} · Parede`, p.parede]);
            if (p.posicao_pct !== '' && p.posicao_pct != null) portas.push([`${tag} · Posição`, p.posicao_pct + '%']);
            if (p.sentido_abertura) portas.push([`${tag} · Sentido`, p.sentido_abertura]);
            if (p.acessorios) portas.push([`${tag} · Acessórios`, p.acessorios]);
          });
        } else {
          add(portas, 'Tipo Porta', s4.porta_tipo);
          add(portas, 'Largura Porta', s4.porta_largura, 'mm');
          add(portas, 'Altura Porta', s4.porta_altura, 'mm');
          add(portas, 'Qtd Portas', s4.porta_quantidade);
          add(portas, 'Sentido Abertura', s4.porta_sentido_abertura);
          add(portas, 'Parede', s4.porta_parede);
          if (s4.porta_posicao_pct !== undefined && s4.porta_posicao_pct !== '') {
            portas.push(['Posição na Parede', s4.porta_posicao_pct + '%']);
          }
          add(portas, 'Acessórios Porta', s4.porta_acessorios);
        }
        add(portas, 'Estante', s4.estante_tipo);
        add(portas, 'Qtd Estantes', s4.estante_quantidade);
        add(portas, 'Níveis/Estante', s4.estante_niveis);
        // Per-compartment estantes (preferred)
        const estPC = (s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === 'object') ? s4.estantes_por_comp : {};
        Object.entries(estPC).forEach(([compName, e]) => {
          if (!e || (!e.tipo && !e.quantidade && !e.niveis)) return;
          if (e.tipo) portas.push([`${compName} · Estante`, e.tipo]);
          if (e.quantidade) portas.push([`${compName} · Qtd Estantes`, e.quantidade]);
          if (e.niveis) portas.push([`${compName} · Níveis`, e.niveis]);
        });
        add(portas, 'Cortina PVC', s4.cortina_pvc);
        add(portas, 'Alarme Temp.', s4.alarme);
        add(portas, 'Estrutura Condensadora', s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora);
        if (portas.length) sections.push({ title: '🚪 Acessórios & Fechamentos', items: portas });

        // ===== Step 5: Instalação e Frete =====
        const install = [];
        add(install, 'Horário Entrega', s5.horario_entrega);
        add(install, 'Horário Instalação', s5.horario_instalacao);
        add(install, 'Transporte Vertical', s5.transporte_vertical);
        add(install, 'Andar', s5.andar);
        add(install, 'Fatur. Mão de Obra', s5.faturamento_mao_obra);
        add(install, 'Tipo Frete', s5.tipo_frete);
        add(install, 'Distância', s5.distancia_km, ' km');
        add(install, 'Exigências Local', s5.exigencias_local);
        add(install, 'Obs. Instalação', s5.observacoes_instalacao);
        if (install.length) sections.push({ title: '🚚 Instalação & Frete', items: install });

        // ===== Step 6: Compartimentos (com herança Etapa 3) =====
        if (compartimentos.length > 0) {
          compartimentos.forEach((comp, idx) => {
            const c = [];
            const compId = comp.compartimento_id || comp.nome_compartimento || `#${idx + 1}`;
            // Inherited from Etapa 3 (or legacy fields)
            if (comp.temperatura_setpoint !== '' && comp.temperatura_setpoint != null) c.push(['Set Point', comp.temperatura_setpoint + '°C']);
            else if (comp.set_point) c.push(['Set Point', comp.set_point + '°C']);
            if (comp.produto_armazenado) c.push(['Produto', comp.produto_armazenado]);
            if (comp._inherited_dim) c.push(['Dimensões', comp._inherited_dim]);
            if (comp._inherited_volume_m3) c.push(['Volume', comp._inherited_volume_m3 + 'm³']);
            if (!comp._inherited_dim && (comp.localizacao_compartimento)) {
              add(c, 'Localização', comp.localizacao_compartimento);
            }
            if (comp.carga_termica_kcal) c.push(['Carga Térmica (informada)', comp.carga_termica_kcal + ' Kcal/h']);
            else if (comp._inherited_carga_kcal_calc) c.push(['Carga Térmica (calculada)', comp._inherited_carga_kcal_calc + ' Kcal/h']);
            // Mechanical
            add(c, 'Compressor', comp.tipo_compressor);
            add(c, 'Marca', comp.marca_preferencia);
            add(c, 'Evaporador', comp.tipo_evaporador);
            add(c, 'Condensador', comp.tipo_condensador);
            add(c, 'Tensão', comp.tensao);
            add(c, 'Degelo', comp.degelo);
            add(c, 'Fluido', comp.fluido_refrigerante);
            if (c.length) sections.push({ title: `❄️ ${compId}`, items: c });
          });
        }

        // ===== Observações gerais =====
        const obs = [];
        if (s1.observacoes_comerciais) obs.push(['Obs. Comerciais', s1.observacoes_comerciais]);
        if (s5.observacoes_instalacao) obs.push(['Obs. Instalação', s5.observacoes_instalacao]);
        if (sub.notes) obs.push(['Notas do Sistema', sub.notes]);
        if (obs.length) sections.push({ title: '📝 Observações', items: obs });

        // ===== RENDER =====
        let html = '';
        try {
          const mini = buildMiniReviewSVG(fd);
          if (mini) html += mini;
        } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
        html += '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:12px;">';
        sections.forEach(sec => {
          html += `<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);">`;
          html += `<h4 style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px;">${sec.title}</h4>`;
          sec.items.forEach(([label, value]) => {
            const strVal = String(value || '—');
            const isLong = strVal.length > 40;
            if (isLong) {
              html += `<div style="margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;display:block;">${escapeHtml(label)}:</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary);display:block;margin-top:2px;word-break:break-word;">${escapeHtml(strVal)}</span></div>`;
            } else {
              html += `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;gap:8px;"><span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;">${escapeHtml(label)}</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);text-align:right;">${escapeHtml(strVal)}</span></div>`;
            }
          });
          html += '</div>';
        });
        html += '</div>';

        // Metadata
        html += `<div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">`;
        html += `<span>ID: ${sub.id}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Protocolo: ${escapeHtml(sub.protocol || '—')}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Session: ${escapeHtml(sub.session_id || '—')}</span>`;
        if (sub.user_id) html += `<span>User: ${escapeHtml(sub.user_id)}</span>`;
        if (sub.processed_at) html += `<span>Processado: ${new Date(sub.processed_at).toLocaleDateString('pt-BR')}</span>`;
