          html += `<div class="comp-card" data-comp-card="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;background:var(--bg-card);border-left:5px solid ${tempColor};">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                <strong style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-primary);">${compHeader}</strong>${tempBadge}
                ${compDimTxt ? `<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${compDimTxt} · ${compPortas.length} porta(s)</span>` : ''}
                ${equipIcons.length ? `<span style="display:inline-flex;gap:4px;margin-left:4px;">${equipIcons.join('')}</span>` : ''}
              </div>
            </div>`;

          if (hints.length > 0) {
            html += `<div style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.5;">
              ${hints.map(h => `<div>${h}</div>`).join('')}
            </div>`;
          }

          // Portas section — minimalista
          html += `<div style="margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;">🚪 Portas (${compPortas.length})</div>`;
          if (compPortas.length === 0) {
            html += `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:6px;text-align:center;">Nenhuma porta — use o botão abaixo</div>`;
          } else {
            compPortas.forEach(({ p, idx }) => { html += renderPortaCard(p, idx); });
          }

          // Primary CTA: open wizard
          html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;align-items:center;">
            <button type="button" data-open-porta-wizard="" data-add-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:var(--color-primary);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
              <i data-lucide="plus" style="width:13px;height:13px;"></i> Adicionar Porta
            </button>
            <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">ou:</span>
          </div>`;

          // Quick-add chips: open wizard pre-filled with preset
          html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px;">`;
          presets.forEach(key => {
            const pre = PORTA_PRESETS[key];
            html += `<button type="button" class="btn-add-preset" data-open-porta-wizard="" data-add-preset="${key}" data-add-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:5px 9px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;" title="${escapeAttr(pre.desc)}">
              ${pre.icon} ${escapeHtml(pre.label.split(' (')[0])}
            </button>`;
          });
          html += `</div>`;
          html += `</div>`;

          // Estantes per-compartment (modelo de GRUPOS) — RESUMO INFORMATIVO + modal
          const estante = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
          // Recalcula qtd automática a cada render para refletir mudanças no tipo/parede
          _refreshEstanteAutoQtd(c.name, c);
          const grupos = estante.grupos || [];
          const totalEst = _grupoTotalQtd(estante);
          const portasSidesC = _portasPorParede(c.name);
          const isEmpty = !estante.tipo && grupos.length === 0;
          const hasConflict = grupos.some(g => portasSidesC[g.parede] && (g.parede==='top'||g.parede==='bottom'||g.parede==='left'||g.parede==='right'));

          html += `<div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px dashed var(--border-color);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;">📚 Estantes deste compartimento</div>
              <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${totalEst} estante(s)${grupos.length?` · ${grupos.length} grupo(s)`:''}</span>
            </div>`;

          if (isEmpty) {
            html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px dashed var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
              <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;flex:1;">Nenhuma estante configurada.</span>
              <button type="button" data-open-estantes-modal="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:var(--color-primary);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">📐 Configurar estantes</button>
            </div>`;
          } else {
            // Resumo informativo
            const tipoTxt = estante.tipo ? estante.tipo : '— sem tipo —';
            const niveisTxt = estante.niveis ? `${estante.niveis} níveis` : '— níveis não definidos —';
            const fracLabel = (v) => {
              const fp = FRACAO_PRESETS.find(f => Math.abs(f.v - v) < 0.01);
              return fp ? fp.label : `${Math.round(v*100)}%`;
            };
            const alLabel = (a) => ({inicio:'⇤',centro:'⇔',fim:'⇥'}[a||'centro'] || '⇔');
            const grupoBadges = grupos.length === 0
              ? `<span style="font-size:11px;color:#f59e0b;font-style:italic;">⚠️ tipo definido mas nenhum grupo adicionado</span>`
              : grupos.map((g, gi) => {
                  const conf = portasSidesC[g.parede] && (g.parede==='top'||g.parede==='bottom'||g.parede==='left'||g.parede==='right');
                  const bg = conf ? 'rgba(245,158,11,0.10)' : 'var(--bg-card)';
                  const bd = conf ? '#f59e0b' : 'var(--border-color)';
                  return `<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:${bg};border:1px solid ${bd};border-radius:12px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-primary);">
                    <strong style="color:#a16207;">G${gi+1}</strong>
                    ${escapeHtml(PAREDE_LABELS_PT[g.parede]||g.parede)}
                    · ${fracLabel(parseFloat(g.fracao)||1)} ${alLabel(g.alinhamento)}
                    · <strong>${parseInt(g.qtd)||0}</strong>${conf?' ⚠️':''}
                  </span>`;
                }).join(' ');

            html += `<div style="background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid ${hasConflict?'#f59e0b':'var(--border-color)'};border-left:3px solid #a16207;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;">
                <div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;">
                  <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">📚 ${escapeHtml(tipoTxt)}</div>
                  <div style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${escapeHtml(niveisTxt)} · ${totalEst} estante(s) total</div>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                  <button type="button" data-open-estantes-modal="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:var(--color-primary);border:none;color:#fff;padding:6px 11px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">✏️ Editar</button>
                  <button type="button" data-clear-estantes="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" title="Remover todas as estantes deste compartimento" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:#ef4444;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">🗑️ Limpar</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;">${grupoBadges}</div>
              ${hasConflict?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:#f59e0b;margin-top:6px;">⚠️ Algum grupo está em uma parede que tem porta — verifique o conflito.</div>`:''}
            </div>`;
          }
          html += `</div>`;

          html += `</div>`;
        });

        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      // ---- Visual chip-based selector for chamber-level acessórios (step 4) ----
      const ACESSORIOS_CAMARA = {
        cortina_pvc: {
          label: 'Cortina de PVC',
          icon: '🪟',
          desc: 'Reduz perda térmica nas aberturas',
          field: 'cortina_pvc',
          options: [
            { value: 'Não',                       label: 'Sem cortina',  icon: '⊘',  desc: 'Não instalar' },
            { value: 'Sim - Transparente',        label: 'Transparente', icon: '🪟', desc: 'Para T ≥ 0°C — visualização' },
            { value: 'Sim - Polar (Anti-UV)',     label: 'Polar (-UV)',  icon: '❄️', desc: 'Para T < 0°C — flexível em frio' },
          ],
        },
        alarme: {
          label: 'Alarme de Temperatura',
          icon: '🚨',
          desc: 'Avisa em caso de falha do sistema',
          field: 'alarme',
          options: [
            { value: 'Não',                          label: 'Sem alarme',     icon: '⊘',  desc: 'Sem monitoramento' },
            { value: 'Sim - Sonoro',                 label: 'Sonoro',          icon: '🔔', desc: 'Sirene básica' },
            { value: 'Sim - Sonoro + Visual',        label: 'Sonoro + Visual', icon: '🚨', desc: 'Sirene + sinaleiro luminoso (recomendado)' },
            { value: 'Sim - Com Discador GSM',       label: 'GSM/SMS',         icon: '📱', desc: 'Avisa por SMS — segmento crítico' },
          ],
        },
        estrutura_unidade_condensadora: {
          label: 'Estrutura p/ Unidade Condensadora',
          icon: '🏗️',
          desc: 'Onde fica instalada a unidade externa',
          field: 'estrutura_unidade_condensadora',
          options: [
            { value: 'Não necessária',                     label: 'Não nec.',     icon: '⊘',  desc: 'Já existe local' },
            { value: 'Sobre laje - base metálica',         label: 'Sobre laje',   icon: '🏢', desc: 'Estrutura metálica sobre laje' },
            { value: 'Parede - suporte mão francesa',      label: 'Mão francesa', icon: '🧱', desc: 'Suporte fixado na parede' },
            { value: 'Estrutura elevada com escada',       label: 'Elevada',      icon: '🪜', desc: 'Plataforma com escada de acesso' },
          ],
        },
      };

      function _step4ProductContext() {
        // Coleta dados de produto/temperatura para filtrar acessórios
        let comps = [];
        try {
          const snap = (typeof getChamberSnapshot === 'function') ? getChamberSnapshot() : null;
          comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
        } catch (e) {}
        let minTemp = Infinity, maxTemp = -Infinity;
        const cats = new Set();
        comps.forEach(c => {
          const cf = c.config || {};
          if (isFinite(cf.temperatura_setpoint)) {
            minTemp = Math.min(minTemp, cf.temperatura_setpoint);
            maxTemp = Math.max(maxTemp, cf.temperatura_setpoint);
          }
          if (cf.categoria_produto) cats.add(cf.categoria_produto);
        });
        if (!isFinite(minTemp)) minTemp = null;
        if (!isFinite(maxTemp)) maxTemp = null;
        const hasNegative = minTemp != null && minTemp < 0;
        const hasPositive = maxTemp != null && maxTemp >= 0;
        const isCritico = cats.has('farmacia_caixa') || cats.has('sorvete') || cats.has('congelados_caixa') || cats.has('pescado_caixa');
        const isFarma = cats.has('farmacia_caixa');
        const hasFreqAlta = comps.some(c => c.config?.frequencia_aberturas === 'alta');
        const empilhadeira = comps.some(c => c.config?.empilhadeira === 'sim' || c.config?.empilhadeira === true);
        const paleteira = comps.some(c => c.config?.paleteira === 'sim' || c.config?.paleteira === true);
        return { minTemp, maxTemp, hasNegative, hasPositive, isCritico, isFarma, hasFreqAlta, cats, empilhadeira, paleteira };
      }

      function renderStep4AcessoriosVisual() {
        if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
        const s4 = formData.step4;
        // Defaults "Nenhum" para acessórios — só aplica se ainda não foram tocados (undefined).
        // Isso permite ao usuário limpar (string vazia) sem voltar para o default.
        if (s4.cortina_pvc === undefined)                  s4.cortina_pvc = 'Não';
        if (s4.alarme === undefined)                       s4.alarme = 'Não';
        if (s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora === undefined) s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora = 'Não necessária';
        const ctx = _step4ProductContext();
        let html = `<div id="step4AcessoriosBlock" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin:14px 0;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <h4 style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">✨ Acessórios da Câmara</h4>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Proteções, alarmes e estrutura — clique para selecionar (clique novamente para limpar).</span>
            ${ctx.minTemp != null ? `<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);background:var(--bg-tertiary);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;">temp: ${ctx.minTemp}°C${ctx.maxTemp!==ctx.minTemp?' a '+ctx.maxTemp+'°C':''}</span>` : ''}
          </div>`;

        Object.values(ACESSORIOS_CAMARA).forEach(group => {
          // Filtra opções que não fazem sentido para o produto/temperatura
          const visible = group.options.filter(opt => {
            // Cortina PVC
            if (group.field === 'cortina_pvc') {
              if (opt.value === 'Sim - Transparente' && ctx.hasNegative && !ctx.hasPositive) return false; // só negativo → polar
              if (opt.value === 'Sim - Polar (Anti-UV)' && !ctx.hasNegative && ctx.minTemp != null) return false; // só positivo → transparente basta
            }
            // Alarme
            if (group.field === 'alarme') {
              // GSM só faz sentido em segmento crítico (farmácia, congelados profundos)
              if (opt.value === 'Sim - Com Discador GSM' && !ctx.isCritico && ctx.minTemp != null) return false;
            }
            return true;
          });
          if (visible.length === 0) return;

          // Smart recommendation por opção
          const isSmart = (opt) => {
            if (group.field === 'cortina_pvc') {
              if (opt.value === 'Sim - Polar (Anti-UV)' && ctx.hasNegative && ctx.hasFreqAlta) return true;
              if (opt.value === 'Sim - Transparente' && ctx.hasPositive && !ctx.hasNegative && ctx.hasFreqAlta) return true;
            }
            if (group.field === 'alarme') {
              if (opt.value === 'Sim - Com Discador GSM' && ctx.isFarma) return true;
              if (opt.value === 'Sim - Sonoro + Visual' && ctx.isCritico && !ctx.isFarma) return true;
            }
            return false;
          };

          const cur = s4[group.field] || '';
          const filteredCount = group.options.length - visible.length;
          html += `<div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <span style="font-size:16px;">${group.icon}</span>
              <strong style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(group.label)}</strong>
              <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">— ${escapeHtml(group.desc)}</span>
              ${filteredCount > 0 ? `<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);background:var(--bg-tertiary);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;" title="Opções ocultas porque não fazem sentido para a temperatura/produto">${filteredCount} opção(ões) oculta(s)</span>` : ''}
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;">
              ${visible.map(opt => {
                const sel = cur === opt.value;
                const isOff = /^não/i.test(opt.value) || opt.value === 'Não necessária';
                const accent = isOff ? 'var(--text-secondary)' : 'var(--color-primary)';
                const smart = isSmart(opt);
                return `<button type="button" class="acc-camara-chip" data-acc-camara-field="${group.field}" data-acc-camara-value="${escapeAttr(opt.value)}" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid ${sel?accent:(smart?'var(--color-warning)':'var(--border-color)')};background:${sel?accent:'var(--bg-tertiary)'};color:${sel?'#fff':'var(--text-primary)'};font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;min-width:120px;">
                  <span style="font-size:16px;">${opt.icon}</span>
                  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1.3;flex:1;">
                    <span>${escapeHtml(opt.label)}${smart && !sel ? ' <span style="color:var(--color-warning);">⭐</span>' : ''}</span>
                    <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:500;opacity:0.85;">${escapeHtml(opt.desc)}</span>
                  </div>
                  ${sel ? '<span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;">✓</span>' : ''}
                </button>`;
              }).join('')}
            </div>
          </div>`;
        });

        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      function bindStep4AcessoriosChips() {
        const panel = document.getElementById('stepPanels');
        if (!panel) return;
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-acc-camara-field]').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const f = btn.getAttribute('data-acc-camara-field');
            const v = btn.getAttribute('data-acc-camara-value');
            if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
            // Toggle: clicando no mesmo valor selecionado, limpa
            const cur = formData.step4[f] || '';
            formData.step4[f] = (cur === v) ? '' : v;
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch(e) {}
            // Re-render apenas o bloco (HTML completo, evita patches frágeis)
            const oldBlock = document.getElementById('step4AcessoriosBlock');
            if (oldBlock) {
              const wrap = document.createElement('div');
              wrap.innerHTML = renderStep4AcessoriosVisual();
              const newBlock = wrap.firstElementChild;
              oldBlock.replaceWith(newBlock);
              bindStep4AcessoriosChips();
              if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') { try { lucide.createIcons(); } catch(e){} }
            }
          });
        });
      }

      function bindPortasEvents() {
        const panel = document.getElementById('stepPanels');
        if (!panel) return;

        const rerender = () => {
          const mgr = document.getElementById('portasManager');
          if (mgr) {
            const wrap = document.createElement('div');
            wrap.innerHTML = renderPortasManager();
            mgr.replaceWith(wrap.firstElementChild);
            bindPortasEvents();
            if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
          }
          if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === 'function') refreshChamberVisualizer();
        };

        // Per-compartment estantes (tipo/niveis no nível do compartimento)
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-estante-comp]').forEach(el => {
          const compName = el.getAttribute('data-estante-comp');
          const field = el.getAttribute('data-estante-field');
          const fixedValue = el.getAttribute('data-estante-value'); // chip buttons
          const handler = (val) => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est[field] = val;
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch (e) {}
            // Mudança de tipo/níveis afeta auto-qtd e cards visuais → re-render do manager
            if (field === 'tipo' || field === 'niveis' || field === 'encosto') {
              rerender();
            } else if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === 'function') {
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
            }
          };
          if (fixedValue !== null) {
            el.addEventListener('click', () => handler(fixedValue));
          } else {
            const change = () => handler(el.value);
            el.addEventListener('input', change);
            el.addEventListener('change', change);
          }
        });

        // ---- Estantes (modal): abrir editor / limpar ----
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-open-estantes-modal]').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const compName = btn.getAttribute('data-open-estantes-modal');
            let comps = [];
            try {
              const snap = (typeof getChamberSnapshot === 'function') ? getChamberSnapshot() : null;
              comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
            } catch (e) { comps = []; }
            const c = comps.find(x => x.name === compName) || { name: compName, x0:0, y0:0, x1:1, y1:1, w:1, h:1 };
            openEstantesModal(c);
          });
        });
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-clear-estantes]').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const compName = btn.getAttribute('data-clear-estantes');
            if (!confirm(`Remover todas as estantes do compartimento ${compName}?`)) return;
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est.tipo = ''; est.niveis = ''; est.quantidade = ''; est.encosto = ''; est.grupos = [];
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch (e) {}
            rerender();
          });
        });

        // Existing porta field bindings
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-porta-idx]').forEach(el => {
          const idx = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-porta-idx'));
          const field = el.getAttribute('data-porta-field');
          const handler = () => {
            if (!Array.isArray(formData.step4.portas)) formData.step4.portas = [];
            if (!formData.step4.portas[idx]) formData.step4.portas[idx] = {};
            formData.step4.portas[idx][field] = el.value;
            // If compartment changed, auto-correct parede if it's no longer on perimeter
            if (field === 'compartimento_id') {
              try {
                const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
                const comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
                const newComp = comps.find(c => c.name === el.value);
                if (newComp) {
                  const allowed = _perimeterWallsForCompartment(newComp, snap);
                  const cur = formData.step4.portas[idx].parede;
                  if (!cur || !allowed.includes(cur)) {
                    const existing = formData.step4.portas.filter((q, qi) => qi !== idx && q.compartimento_id === el.value);
                    formData.step4.portas[idx].parede = _pickWallForCompartment(newComp, snap, existing);
                  }
                }
              } catch (e) {}
            }
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch (e) {}
            // Re-render manager so parede options reflect new compartment
            if (field === 'compartimento_id') { rerender(); return; }
            if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === 'function') refreshChamberVisualizer();
          };
          el.addEventListener('input', handler);
          el.addEventListener('change', handler);
        });

        // Remove porta
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-porta-remove]').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute('data-porta-remove'));
            formData.step4.portas.splice(idx, 1);
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch (e) {}
            rerender();
          });
        });

        // Quick-add presets
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-open-porta-wizard]').forEach(btn => {
          btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const presetKey = btn.getAttribute('data-add-preset') || null;
            const compName = btn.getAttribute('data-add-comp') || null;
            const editIdxAttr = btn.getAttribute('data-edit-porta-idx');
            const editIdx = (editIdxAttr != null) ? parseInt(editIdxAttr) : -1;
            openPortaModal({
              compName: compName || (formData.step4?.portas?.[editIdx]?.compartimento_id) || null,
              presetKey: presetKey,
              editIdx: editIdx >= 0 ? editIdx : undefined,
            });
          });
        });

        // Per-compartment estantes
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-estante-comp]').forEach(el => {
          const compName = el.getAttribute('data-estante-comp');
          const field = el.getAttribute('data-estante-field');
          const fixedValue = el.getAttribute('data-estante-value'); // chip buttons
          const handler = (val) => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est[field] = val;
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch (e) {}
            if (field === 'encosto') {
              // Re-render apenas para atualizar o estado visual dos chips
              renderCurrentStep();
            } else if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === 'function') {
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
            }
          };
          if (fixedValue !== null) {
            // Chip button (e.g., encosto)
            el.addEventListener('click', () => handler(fixedValue));
          } else {
            const change = () => handler(el.value);
            el.addEventListener('input', change);
            el.addEventListener('change', change);
          }
        });

        // SVG visual selector (paredes clicáveis + ilha) — toggle multi-seleção
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-encosto-side]').forEach(g => {
          const compName = g.getAttribute('data-encosto-comp');
          const side = g.getAttribute('data-encosto-side');
          if (!compName || !side) return;
          g.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            const cur = parseEncostoSides(est.encosto);
            let next;
            if (side === 'center') {
              next = cur.includes('center') ? [] : ['center'];
            } else {
              const set = new Set(cur.filter(s => s !== 'center'));
              if (set.has(side)) set.delete(side); else set.add(side);
              next = Array.from(set);
            }
            est.encosto = sidesToEncostoCode(next);
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch (e) {}
            renderCurrentStep();
          });
        });

        // Presets de encosto (Limpar, L, U, Perímetro, Ilha)
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-encosto-preset]').forEach(b => {
          const compName = b.getAttribute('data-encosto-comp');
          const code = b.getAttribute('data-encosto-preset') || '';
          if (!compName) return;
          b.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est.encosto = code; // string vazia = sem encosto definido
            try { saveToStorage(); } catch (e) {}
            renderCurrentStep();
          });
        });

        // Botão "Definir/Mudar layout" → abre modal completo
        panel.querySelectorAll('[data-open-estante-modal]').forEach(b => {
          const compName = b.getAttribute('data-open-estante-modal');
          if (!compName) return;
          b.addEventListener('click', () => {
            // Resolve o objeto do compartimento (precisa de x0/y0/x1/y1)
            let comps = [];
            try {
              const snap = (typeof getChamberSnapshot === 'function') ? getChamberSnapshot() : null;
              comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
            } catch (e) { comps = []; }
            const c = comps.find(x => x.name === compName) || { name: compName, x0:0, y0:0, x1:1, y1:1 };
            openEstanteLayoutModal(c);
          });
        });
      }

      function runRealityCheck() {
        // Garantir que cada compartimento tenha (no mínimo) 1 porta atribuída,
        // mesmo antes do usuário abrir a Etapa 4. Isso evita o falso-alarme
        // "Compartimento Cx não tem porta configurada" no painel de Análise
        // enquanto o usuário ainda está na Etapa 3.
        try {
          if (typeof syncStep4PortasWithCompartments === 'function') {
            syncStep4PortasWithCompartments();
          }
        } catch (e) {}
        const s3 = formData.step3 || {};
        const s4 = formData.step4 || {};
        const s6 = formData.step6 || {};
        const compartimentos = s6.compartimentos || [];
        const comp = compartimentos[0] || {};
        const uso = rcGetUsoFromForm();

        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        const compartments = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
        const issues = [];
        const collect = (arr) => { if (Array.isArray(arr)) issues.push(...arr); };

        collect(rcValidateModularGrid(s3));
        collect(rcValidatePanelThickness(s3, comp));
        collect(rcValidateFloor(s3, comp, uso));
        collect(rcValidateDivisorias(snap));
        collect(rcValidateClima(snap, comp));

        const carga = rcCalculateThermalLoadByCompartment(compartments, snap, comp, uso);
        collect(rcValidateCompressor(carga, comp));
        collect(rcValidateDoor(s4, snap, comp, uso));
        collect(rcValidateAccessories(s4, comp, uso));
        collect(rcValidateDoorVsShelves(s4, snap, compartments));
        collect(rcValidateEquipmentVsStructure(snap, compartments));
        collect(rcValidateCapacity(snap, uso));
        collect(rcValidateCompartmentConfig(compartments, snap));
        collect(rcValidateCompartmentLuminarias(compartments));
        collect(rcValidateCompartmentDoors(compartments, s4));

        // Fit score
        let score = 100;
        for (const it of issues) {
          if (it.level === 'error')      score -= 20;
          else if (it.level === 'warning') score -= 7;
          else if (it.level === 'suggestion') score -= 2;
        }
        if (formData._client_id) score += 3;
        if (snap.volume > 0 && compartimentos.length) score += 2;
        score = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score));

        const blocking = issues.some(i => i.level === 'error');
        const result = {
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
          derived: {
            volume_m3: +(snap.volume || 0).toFixed(2),
            area_piso_m2: +(snap.area || 0).toFixed(2),
            carga_termica: carga,
            fit_score: score,
            compartments: compartments,
            compartments_count: compartments.length,
          },
          issues,
          blocking,
          counts: {
            error: issues.filter(i => i.level === 'error').length,
            warning: issues.filter(i => i.level === 'warning').length,
            info: issues.filter(i => i.level === 'info').length,
            suggestion: issues.filter(i => i.level === 'suggestion').length,
          },
        };
        formData._reality_check = result;
        try { localStorage.setItem('wizard_reality_check', JSON.stringify(result)); } catch(e){}
        return result;
      }

      // ---- Sidebar UI ----
      function ensureRcSidebar() {
        let sb = document.getElementById('rcSidebar');
        if (sb) return sb;
        const wizardContainer = document.querySelector('.wizard-container');
        if (!wizardContainer) return null;
        sb = document.createElement('section');
        sb.id = 'rcSidebar';
        sb.className = 'rc-panel collapsed';
        sb.innerHTML = `
          <div class="rc-panel-header" id="rcSidebarHeader">
            <span class="rc-panel-title">📊 Análise</span>
            <div class="rc-panel-summary" id="rcPanelSummary"></div>
            <button type="button" class="rc-toggle-btn" id="rcSidebarToggle" title="Expandir/Recolher">▾</button>
          </div>
          <div class="rc-panel-body" id="rcSidebarBody"></div>
        `;
        // Insert at top of wizard-container, before step-indicator
        const stepIndicator = wizardContainer.querySelector('.step-indicator');
        if (stepIndicator) wizardContainer.insertBefore(sb, stepIndicator);
        else wizardContainer.prepend(sb);

        const header = sb.querySelector('#rcSidebarHeader');
        header.addEventListener('click', () => {
          sb.classList.toggle('collapsed');
        });
        return sb;
      }

      function rcLevelLabel(lv) {
        return ({ error: '🔴 ERRO', warning: '⚠️ AVISO', info: 'ℹ️ INFO', suggestion: '💡 SUGESTÃO' })[lv] || lv;
      }

      function refreshRcSidebar() {
        const app = document.getElementById('appContainer');
        const sb = ensureRcSidebar();
        if (!sb) return;
        if (!app || app.style.display === 'none') {
          sb.classList.add('hidden');
          return;
        }
        sb.classList.remove('hidden');

        const rc = runRealityCheck();
        const fitColor = rc.derived.fit_score >= 90 ? '#22c55e'
                       : rc.derived.fit_score >= 70 ? '#3b82f6'
                       : rc.derived.fit_score >= 50 ? '#f97316'
                       : '#ef4444';
        const fitLabel = rc.derived.fit_score >= 90 ? 'Excelente'
                       : rc.derived.fit_score >= 70 ? 'Bom'
                       : rc.derived.fit_score >= 50 ? 'Atenção'
                       : 'Bloqueado';

        // ---- HEADER SUMMARY (always visible) ----
        const summary = sb.querySelector('#rcPanelSummary');
        const vol = rc.derived.volume_m3 > 0 ? rc.derived.volume_m3 + ' m³' : '— m³';
        const carga = rc.derived.carga_termica?.kcal_h ? rc.derived.carga_termica.kcal_h + ' Kcal/h' : '— Kcal/h';
        summary.innerHTML = `
          <span class="rc-summary-stat"><strong>${vol}</strong></span>
          <span class="rc-summary-stat">${carga}</span>
          <span class="rc-summary-fit">
            <span>Fit <strong>${rc.derived.fit_score}</strong> · ${fitLabel}</span>
            <span class="rc-summary-bar"><span class="rc-summary-bar-fill" style="width:${rc.derived.fit_score}%;background:${fitColor};"></span></span>
          </span>
          <span class="rc-counts-inline">
            ${rc.counts.error    ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-error">🔴 ${rc.counts.error}</span>` : ''}
            ${rc.counts.warning  ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-warn">⚠️ ${rc.counts.warning}</span>` : ''}
            ${rc.counts.info     ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-info">ℹ️ ${rc.counts.info}</span>` : ''}
            ${rc.counts.suggestion ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-sug">💡 ${rc.counts.suggestion}</span>` : ''}
          </span>
        `;

        // ---- BODY (only when expanded) ----
        const body = sb.querySelector('#rcSidebarBody');
        const tFormulaCarga = `Volume × fator(°C) × multiplicadores\nFator (°C): >15→30 · 5-15→50 · 0-5→70 · -18→95 · -25→125 · -35→250 · <-35→380\nMultiplicadores: alta freq +25% · prod quente +30% · sol +15% · pessoas +12% · empilh +12% · ilum +8% · margem segurança +10%`;
        const tFormulaVol = `Volume Interno = (Comp - 2×esp) × (Larg - 2×esp) × (Alt - 2×esp)\nesp = espessura do painel (m)`;
        const tFormulaArea = `Área Piso Interna = (Comp - 2×esp) × (Larg - 2×esp)`;
        const tFormulaPot  = `Potência (kW) = Carga Térmica (Kcal/h) ÷ 860`;
        let html = '';
        html += `<div class="rc-derived">
          <div class="rc-derived-stat" title="${escapeAttr(tFormulaVol)}"><span class="label">Volume ⓘ</span><span class="value">${rc.derived.volume_m3 || '—'} m³</span></div>
          <div class="rc-derived-stat" title="${escapeAttr(tFormulaArea)}"><span class="label">Área Piso ⓘ</span><span class="value">${rc.derived.area_piso_m2 || '—'} m²</span></div>
          <div class="rc-derived-stat" title="${escapeAttr(tFormulaCarga)}"><span class="label">Carga Térm. ⓘ</span><span class="value">${rc.derived.carga_termica?.kcal_h || '—'}</span></div>
          <div class="rc-derived-stat" title="${escapeAttr(tFormulaPot)}"><span class="label">Potência ⓘ</span><span class="value">${rc.derived.carga_termica?.kw_termico || '—'} kW</span></div>
        </div>`;

        const usoData = rcGetUsoFromForm();
        const usoCount = Object.keys(usoData).length;
        const compsCfg = (typeof rcGetCompartmentsConfig === 'function') ? rcGetCompartmentsConfig() : {};
        const compsConfigured = Object.keys(compsCfg).length;
        html += `<button type="button" class="rc-uso-btn" onclick="goToStep3ForCompartments()">
          🎯 ${currentStep === 3 ? 'Configure os compartimentos abaixo' : 'Configurar compartimentos (Etapa 3)'}${compsConfigured > 0 ? ' · ' + compsConfigured + ' configurado(s)' : ''}
        </button>`;

        if (!rc.issues.length) {
          html += `<div class="rc-empty">Nenhum problema detectado.</div>`;
        } else {
          const order = { error: 0, warning: 1, info: 2, suggestion: 3 };
          const sorted = [...rc.issues].sort((a, b) => (order[a.level] || 9) - (order[b.level] || 9));
          html += `<div class="rc-issues-list">`;
          sorted.forEach((it, idx) => {
            const stepN = it.autofix?.step ? parseInt(String(it.autofix.step).replace('step',''), 10) : null;
            const fld = it.autofix?.field || it.field || '';
            const clickable = (stepN || fld) ? ' rc-issue-clickable' : '';
            const dataAttrs = `data-rc-step="${stepN || ''}" data-rc-field="${escapeAttr(fld)}"`;
            html += `<div class="rc-issue rc-issue-${it.level}${clickable}" ${dataAttrs} onclick="rcJumpToField(this)">
              <strong>${rcLevelLabel(it.level)}${it.category ? ' · ' + it.category : ''}</strong>
              ${escapeHtml(it.message || '')}`;
            if (it.autofix) {
              html += `<div class="rc-issue-actions">
                <button type="button" class="primary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();applyRcAutofix(${idx})">Aplicar correção</button>
              </div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
          });
          html += `</div>`;
        }
        body.innerHTML = html;
        sb.dataset.rcIssues = JSON.stringify(rc.issues);
        // Render inline badges on the form fields themselves
        renderInlineRcBadges(rc.issues);
      }

      // --- Inline RC: render badges next to the offending field ---
      function renderInlineRcBadges(issues) {
        // Clear previous badges + flag classes
        document.querySelectorAll('.rc-inline-issues').forEach(el => el.remove());
        document.querySelectorAll('.form-group.rc-flagged-error, .form-group.rc-flagged-warning').forEach(el => {
          el.classList.remove('rc-flagged-error', 'rc-flagged-warning');
        });
        if (!issues || !issues.length) return;
        const panel = document.querySelector('#stepPanels .step-panel.active') || document.getElementById('stepPanels');
        if (!panel) return;
        // Same sort as the side panel so autofix idx matches
        const order = { error: 0, warning: 1, info: 2, suggestion: 3 };
        const sorted = [...issues].sort((a, b) => (order[a.level] || 9) - (order[b.level] || 9));
        // Group by field-in-current-step
        const byField = {};
        sorted.forEach((it, idx) => {
          const stepN = it.autofix?.step ? parseInt(String(it.autofix.step).replace('step',''), 10) : null;
          const fld = it.autofix?.field || it.field;
          if (!fld) return;
          if (stepN && stepN !== currentStep) return;
          (byField[fld] = byField[fld] || []).push({ it, idx });
        });
        Object.keys(byField).forEach(fname => {
          const target = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${fname}"]`);
          if (!target) return;
          const group = target.closest('.form-group') || target.parentElement;
          if (!group) return;
          // Determine worst level for the ring color
          const worst = byField[fname].some(x => x.it.level === 'error') ? 'error'
                      : byField[fname].some(x => x.it.level === 'warning') ? 'warning' : null;
          if (worst) group.classList.add('rc-flagged-' + worst);
          const wrap = document.createElement('div');
          wrap.className = 'rc-inline-issues';
          wrap.innerHTML = byField[fname].map(({ it, idx }) => {
            const lvlClass = `rc-inline-${it.level === 'error' ? 'error' : it.level === 'warning' ? 'warning' : it.level === 'suggestion' ? 'suggestion' : 'info'}`;
            const tag = it.level === 'error' ? '🔴 ERRO'
                      : it.level === 'warning' ? '⚠️ AVISO'
                      : it.level === 'suggestion' ? '💡 SUGESTÃO'
                      : 'ℹ️ INFO';
            const fixBtn = it.autofix
              ? `<button type="button" onclick="applyRcAutofix(${idx})">✨ Corrigir automaticamente</button>`
              : '';
            return `<div class="rc-inline-issue ${lvlClass}">
              <span class="rc-msg"><span class="rc-tag">${tag}</span>${escapeHtml(it.message || '')}</span>
              ${fixBtn}
            </div>`;
          }).join('');
          // Insert at the very end of the form-group (after field-error span)
          group.appendChild(wrap);
        });
      }

      // Click a panel issue → jump to the matching field/step
      function rcJumpToField(el) {
        const stepN = parseInt(el.dataset.rcStep, 10);
        const fname = el.dataset.rcField;
        if (stepN && stepN !== currentStep) {
          currentStep = stepN;
          renderCurrentStep();
          // Wait for re-render before scrolling
          setTimeout(() => { refreshRcSidebar(); rcScrollToField(fname); }, 200);
        } else {
          rcScrollToField(fname);
        }
      }
      function rcScrollToField(fname) {
        if (!fname) return;
        const target = document.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${fname}"]`);
        if (!target) return;
        const group = target.closest('.form-group') || target;
        group.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
        // Brief flash
        const orig = group.style.transition;
        group.style.transition = 'background 0.4s';
        const prev = group.style.background;
        group.style.background = 'rgba(255,189,89,0.25)';
        setTimeout(() => { group.style.background = prev; group.style.transition = orig; }, 900);
        // Focus first interactive element
        const focusEl = target.matches('input,select,textarea') ? target : target.querySelector('input,select,textarea');
        if (focusEl) try { focusEl.focus({ preventScroll: true }); } catch(e) {}
      }
      window.rcJumpToField = rcJumpToField;
      window.rcScrollToField = rcScrollToField;

      function applyRcAutofix(idx) {
        const sb = document.getElementById('rcSidebar');
        let issues = [];
        try { issues = JSON.parse(sb?.dataset.rcIssues || '[]'); } catch(e){}
        const order = { error: 0, warning: 1, info: 2, suggestion: 3 };
        const sorted = [...issues].sort((a, b) => (order[a.level] || 9) - (order[b.level] || 9));
        const it = sorted[idx];
        if (!it || !it.autofix) return;
        const { step, field, value } = it.autofix;
        if (!step || !field) return;

        // Caso especial: ajuste do total de luminárias deve distribuir entre
        // os compartimentos (campo é read-only, somatório automático).
        if (step === 'step3' && field === 'qtd_luminarias') {
          if (typeof applySuggestion === 'function') {
            applySuggestion('step3', 'qtd_luminarias', value, document.body);
            addChatMessage(`✅ Correção aplicada: **${field}** → \`${value}\` (distribuído entre compartimentos)`, 'system');
            return;
          }
        }

        if (!formData[step]) formData[step] = {};
        formData[step][field] = value;
        saveToStorage();
        // If currently viewing affected step, re-render
        if (currentStep && ('step' + currentStep) === step) {
          renderCurrentStep();
        }
        refreshChamberVisualizer();
        refreshRcSidebar();
        addChatMessage(`✅ Correção aplicada: **${field}** → \`${value}\``, 'system');
      }

      // ---- Modal de Configuração por Compartimento ----
      function openCompartmentConfig(compName) {
        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        const comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
        const c = comps.find(x => x.name === compName);
        if (!c) { uiAlert(`Compartimento ${compName} não encontrado.`, { variant: 'error' }); return; }
        const cfgAll = rcGetCompartmentsConfig();
        const cfg = cfgAll[compName] || {};

        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.id = 'compConfigOverlay';
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;z-index:10250;overflow-y:auto;padding:24px 12px;';
        const initialTemp = (cfg.temperatura_setpoint != null) ? parseFloat(cfg.temperatura_setpoint) : NaN;
        const catOpts = rcBuildCategoryOptionsHTML(cfg.categoria_produto || '', initialTemp);
        const initialCatHint = rcCategoryHintHTML(cfg.categoria_produto || '', initialTemp);
        const freqOpts = ['baixa', 'media', 'alta'].map(f =>
          `<option value="${f}" ${cfg.frequencia_aberturas === f ? 'selected' : ''}>${f === 'baixa' ? 'Baixa (<5/h)' : f === 'media' ? 'Média (5-15/h)' : 'Alta (>15/h)'}</option>`
        ).join('');
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;width:100%;max-width:560px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);margin:auto;min-width:0;">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;">
              <h3 style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">⚙️ Configurar Compartimento ${c.name}</h3>
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('compConfigOverlay').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:18px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:14px;">
              ${c.w}m × ${c.h}m · ${c.area}m² (canto ${c.x0.toFixed(2)},${c.y0.toFixed(2)}m)
            </div>
            <div style="display:grid;gap:10px;min-width:0;">
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                <div style="margin-bottom:6px;">
                  Temperatura de Operação <span style="color:var(--color-error);">*</span>
                </div>
                <div id="cfgTempSlider" style="position:relative;user-select:none;touch-action:pan-y;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);background:var(--bg-input);padding:0;overflow:hidden;">
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:stretch;height:56px;">
                    <button type="button" id="cfgTempPrev" aria-label="Anterior" style="flex:0 0 44px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:color 0.15s;">‹</button>
                    <div id="cfgTempDisplay" style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;position:relative;">
                      <span id="cfgTempLabel" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text-primary);transition:transform 0.25s ease,opacity 0.25s ease;">— °C</span>
                      <span id="cfgTempSub" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;transition:opacity 0.2s;">Deslize ou toque nas setas</span>
                    </div>
                    <button type="button" id="cfgTempNext" aria-label="Próximo" style="flex:0 0 44px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:color 0.15s;">›</button>
                  </div>
                  <div id="cfgTempDots" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 0 10px;"></div>
                </div>
                <div id="cfgTempDesc" style="margin-top:6px;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--color-primary-soft, rgba(77,137,170,0.08));border-left:3px solid var(--color-primary);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--text-primary);min-height:18px;">
                  Selecione a temperatura para ver detalhes de uso.
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top:8px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:8px;">
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;">
                    <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Ajuste fino / temperatura customizada</span>
                    <span id="cfgRangeVal" style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">— °C</span>
                  </div>
                  <input type="range" id="cfgTempRangeSlider" min="-40" max="15" step="1" value="${cfg.temperatura_setpoint != null ? cfg.temperatura_setpoint : '-10'}" style="width:100%;accent-color:var(--color-primary);cursor:pointer;"/>
                  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">
                    <span>-40 °C</span><span>-25</span><span>-10</span><span>0</span><span>+15 °C</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <input type="hidden" id="cfgTemp" value="${cfg.temperatura_setpoint != null ? cfg.temperatura_setpoint : ''}"/>
              </div>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Finalidade / Categoria do Produto
                <select id="cfgCategoria" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;">
                  ${catOpts}
                </select>
                <div id="cfgCategoriaHint" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;">${initialCatHint}</div>
              </label>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Descrição livre (opcional)
                <input type="text" id="cfgFinalidade" value="${escapeAttr(cfg.finalidade || '')}" placeholder="Ex: Resfriamento de carne suína" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
              </label>
              <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);gap:10px;">
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);min-width:0;">Estoque-alvo (kg)
                  <input type="number" id="cfgKg" min="0" step="50" value="${cfg.kg_estoque_alvo != null ? cfg.kg_estoque_alvo : ''}" placeholder="Ex: 2000" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
                </label>
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);min-width:0;">Frequência aberturas/h <span style="color:var(--color-error);">*</span>
                  <select id="cfgFreq" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;">
                    <option value="">— Selecione —</option>
                    ${freqOpts}
                  </select>
                </label>
              </div>
              <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);gap:8px;">
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                  <input type="checkbox" id="cfgEmpilh" ${cfg.empilhadeira ? 'checked' : ''}/> Empilhadeira
                </label>
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                  <input type="checkbox" id="cfgPalet" ${cfg.paleteira ? 'checked' : ''}/> Paleteira
                </label>
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                  <input type="checkbox" id="cfgQuente" ${cfg.produto_quente ? 'checked' : ''}/> Produto entra quente
                </label>
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                  <input type="checkbox" id="cfgCritico" ${cfg.segmento_critico ? 'checked' : ''}/> Segmento crítico
                </label>
              </div>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                <span style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
                  <span>💡 Quantidade de Luminárias neste compartimento <span style="color:var(--color-error);">*</span></span>
                  <span id="cfgLumSugestao" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-weight:600;"></span>
                </span>
                <input type="number" id="cfgLum" min="0" max="20" step="1" value="${cfg.qtd_luminarias != null ? cfg.qtd_luminarias : ''}" placeholder="Obrigatório — sugestão ao lado" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
              </label>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Observações
                <textarea id="cfgObs" rows="2" maxlength="300" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;resize:vertical;">${escapeHtml(cfg.observacoes || '')}</textarea>
              </label>
              <div id="cfgAnalysis" style="font-size:11px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;line-height:1.5;"></div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:14px;">
              <button onclick="clearCompartmentConfig('${c.name}')" style="padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--color-error);color:var(--color-error);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Limpar</button>
              <span style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
                <button onclick="document.getElementById('compConfigOverlay').remove()" style="padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
                <button id="cfgSaveBtn" onclick="saveCompartmentConfig('${c.name}')" style="padding:8px 14px;background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Salvar</button>
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove(); });

        const tempEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTemp');
        const catEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgCategoria');
        const kgEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgKg');
        const empEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgEmpilh');
        const palEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgPalet');
        const quenteEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgQuente');
        const freqEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgFreq');
        const analysisEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgAnalysis');
        const lumEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgLum');
        const lumSug = overlay.querySelector('#cfgLumSugestao');

        function liveAnalysis() {
          const t = parseFloat(tempEl.value);
          const cat = catEl.value;
          const kg = parseFloat(kgEl.value) || 0;
          const useEmp = empEl.checked, usePal = palEl.checked, quente = quenteEl.checked;
          const freq = freqEl.value;

          let html = '';
          if (!isFinite(t)) {
            html += `<span style="color:var(--color-error);">⚠️ Sem temperatura, não é possível calcular carga térmica nem validar painel.</span>`;
          } else {
            // Volume útil deste compartimento (alturaInt × área compartimento)
            const altInt = Math.max(0, snap.altInt || 0);
            const volComp = c.area * altInt;
            // Carga térmica isolada deste compartimento
            const row = rcFindRange(RC_THERMAL_FACTOR_TABLE, t);
            let carga = volComp * row.factor;
            if (freq === 'alta') carga *= 1.25;
            if (quente) carga *= 1.30;
            if (useEmp) carga *= 1.12;
            if (c.config?.parede_externa_sol) carga *= 1.15;
            carga *= 1.10;
            const kw = +(carga / 860).toFixed(2);
            html += `<strong>📊 Análise local de ${c.name}:</strong><br>`;
            html += `• Volume útil: ${volComp.toFixed(2)} m³ (área ${c.area}m² × altura ${altInt.toFixed(2)}m)<br>`;
            html += `• Carga térmica isolada: <strong>${Math.round(carga)} Kcal/h</strong> (${kw} kW)<br>`;
            html += `• Faixa de painel mínima (PU): <strong>${rcFindRange(RC_MIN_THICKNESS_PU, t).mm} mm</strong><br>`;

            if (cat) {
              const dens = RC_STORAGE_DENSITY[cat] || 250;
              const fatorUtil = (useEmp || usePal) ? 0.55 : 0.70;
              const capKg = Math.round(volComp * fatorUtil * dens);
              if (kg > 0) {
                const ratio = kg / capKg;
                const cor = ratio > 1.10 ? 'var(--color-error)' : (ratio < 0.40 ? 'var(--color-warning,#f97316)' : 'var(--color-success,#22c55e)');
                html += `• Capacidade estimada: ~${capKg}kg · alvo ${kg}kg = <span style="color:${cor};font-weight:700;">${Math.round(ratio*100)}%</span><br>`;
              } else {
                html += `• Capacidade estimada: ~${capKg}kg de ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]} (volume × densidade × utilização ${Math.round(fatorUtil*100)}%)<br>`;
              }
            }
            // Cross-warnings
            const warns = [];
            const infos = [];
            // Empilhadeira requirements
            if (useEmp) {
              if (c.w < 2.5 || c.h < 2.5) warns.push('Compartimento pequeno para empilhadeira (mínimo recomendado 2,5m de lado).');
              if (altInt < 3.5) warns.push(`Altura interna ${altInt.toFixed(2)}m insuficiente para empilhadeira (mín. recomendado: 3,50m para circulação + rack).`);
              infos.push('🚛 <strong>Porta mínima p/ empilhadeira:</strong> 2400×3000mm (largura×altura). Piso reforçado obrigatório.');
              infos.push('🚛 <strong>Corredor:</strong> mín. 3,20m entre racks para manobra.');
            }
            // Paleteira requirements
            if (usePal && !useEmp) {
              if (altInt < 2.5) warns.push(`Altura interna ${altInt.toFixed(2)}m baixa para paleteira (mín. recomendado: 2,50m).`);
              infos.push('🏗️ <strong>Porta mínima p/ paleteira:</strong> 1500×2200mm. Piso liso e nivelado recomendado.');
            }
            // Temperature vs category (faixa por categoria + heurísticas legadas)
            if (cat) {
              const r = RC_USO_TEMP_RANGES[cat];
              if (r && (t < r.min || t > r.max)) {
                warns.push(`Temperatura ${t}°C fora da faixa de <strong>${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}</strong> (${r.min}°C a ${r.max}°C).`);
              } else if (r && (t < r.ideal[0] || t > r.ideal[1])) {
                infos.push(`🌡️ ${t}°C é tolerável para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}, mas o ideal é ${r.ideal[0]}°C a ${r.ideal[1]}°C.`);
              }
            }
            if (t < -10 && cat && /hortifruti|flores|bebidas/.test(cat)) warns.push(`Temperatura ${t}°C inadequada para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}.`);
            if (t > 8 && cat && /sorvete|congelados|carne/.test(cat)) warns.push(`Temperatura ${t}°C alta demais para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}.`);
            // Frequency impact
            if (freq === 'alta') infos.push('🚪 <strong>Alta frequência:</strong> cortina PVC recomendada para reduzir consumo (~20%).');
            // Produto quente
            if (quente) infos.push('🔥 <strong>Produto quente:</strong> +30% na carga térmica. Considere antecâmara ou pré-resfriamento.');

            if (warns.length) {
              html += `<br><strong style="color:var(--color-error);">⚠️ Alertas:</strong><br>` + warns.map(w => '• ' + w).join('<br>');
            }
            if (infos.length) {
              html += `<br><strong style="color:var(--color-info,#0ea5e9);">📋 Requisitos de logística:</strong><br>` + infos.map(i => '• ' + i).join('<br>');
            }
          }
          // Luminárias suggestion (Reality Check shared logic)
          const lumRec = rcRecommendLuminarias(c, cat, t);
          const lumVal = parseInt(lumEl.value);
          const lumActual = isFinite(lumVal) && lumVal >= 0 ? lumVal : lumRec.recommended;
          const lumStatus = rcEvaluateLuminarias(lumActual, lumRec);
          if (lumSug) {
            const txt = isFinite(lumVal) && lumVal >= 0
              ? `${lumStatus.icon} ${lumStatus.label}`
              : `Sugerido: ${lumRec.recommended} (~${lumRec.lux} lux)`;
            lumSug.textContent = txt;
            lumSug.style.color = lumStatus.color || 'var(--text-secondary)';
          }
          analysisEl.innerHTML = html;

          // Atualiza grupos da finalidade conforme a temperatura muda
          const tempKey = isFinite(t) ? String(t) : '';
          if (catEl.dataset.lastTempKey !== tempKey) {
            const keep = catEl.value;
            catEl.innerHTML = rcBuildCategoryOptionsHTML(keep, t);
            catEl.value = keep; // preserva seleção (mesmo que vire "não recomendada")
            catEl.dataset.lastTempKey = tempKey;
          }
          // Dica contextual abaixo da finalidade
          const hintEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgCategoriaHint');
          if (hintEl) hintEl.innerHTML = rcCategoryHintHTML(catEl.value, t);
        }
        [tempEl, catEl, kgEl, empEl, palEl, quenteEl, freqEl, lumEl].forEach(el => el && el.addEventListener('input', liveAnalysis));
        if (catEl) catEl.addEventListener('change', liveAnalysis);
        // Temperature slider navigation
        const TEMP_OPTIONS = [
          { v: -25, label: '-25 °C', desc: 'Congelamento profundo · sorvetes, pescados, carnes longas' },
          { v: -18, label: '-18 °C', desc: 'Padrão para alimentos congelados (ANVISA / RDC)' },
          { v: -10, label: '-10 °C', desc: 'Pré-congelamento / armazenagem temporária' },
          { v:   0, label:  '0 °C', desc: 'Resfriamento profundo · pescado fresco' },
          { v:   2, label:  '2 °C', desc: 'Carnes resfriadas, laticínios e embutidos' },
          { v:   4, label:  '4 °C', desc: 'Padrão para resfriados (refrigerador comercial)' },
          { v:   6, label:  '6 °C', desc: 'Frutas, hortaliças e produtos prontos' },
          { v:   8, label:  '8 °C', desc: 'Bebidas, ovos, frutas tropicais sensíveis ao frio' },
          { v:  12, label: '12 °C', desc: 'Adega / climatizado · vinhos, chocolates, banana' },
          { v:  15, label: '15 °C', desc: 'Limite superior · ambiente seco controlado' },
        ];
        const tempDescEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempDesc');
        const tempLabelEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempLabel');
        const tempSubEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempSub');
        const tempDotsEl = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempDots');
        const tempSlider = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempSlider');
        const tempPrev = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempPrev');
        const tempNext = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempNext');

        let tempIdx = -1; // no selection
        const curVal = parseFloat(tempEl.value);
        if (isFinite(curVal)) {
          tempIdx = TEMP_OPTIONS.findIndex(t => t.v === curVal);
        }

        // Render dots
        function renderDots() {
          if (!tempDotsEl) return;
          tempDotsEl.innerHTML = TEMP_OPTIONS.map((_, i) =>
            `<span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:${i === tempIdx ? 'var(--color-primary)' : 'var(--border-color)'};transition:background 0.2s;"></span>`
          ).join('');
        }

        function updateTempUI(animate) {
          const opt = tempIdx >= 0 ? TEMP_OPTIONS[tempIdx] : null;
          const curTemp = parseFloat(tempEl.value);
          if (opt) {
            tempEl.value = opt.v;
            if (tempLabelEl) {
              if (animate) {
                tempLabelEl.style.opacity = '0';
                setTimeout(() => {
                  tempLabelEl.textContent = opt.label;
                  tempLabelEl.style.opacity = '1';
                }, 120);
              } else {
                tempLabelEl.textContent = opt.label;
                tempLabelEl.style.opacity = '1';
              }
              tempLabelEl.style.color = rcColorForTemp(opt.v) !== '#e5e7eb' ? rcColorForTemp(opt.v) : 'var(--text-primary)';
            }
            if (tempSubEl) tempSubEl.textContent = opt.desc.split('·')[0].trim();
            if (tempDescEl) {
              tempDescEl.innerHTML = `<strong>${escapeHtml(opt.label)}</strong> — ${escapeHtml(opt.desc)}`;
              tempDescEl.style.opacity = '1';
            }
          } else if (isFinite(curTemp)) {
            // Custom temperature (from range slider)
            if (tempLabelEl) {
              tempLabelEl.textContent = `${curTemp} °C`;
              tempLabelEl.style.opacity = '1';
              tempLabelEl.style.color = rcColorForTemp(curTemp) !== '#e5e7eb' ? rcColorForTemp(curTemp) : 'var(--text-primary)';
            }
            if (tempSubEl) tempSubEl.textContent = 'Temperatura personalizada';
            if (tempDescEl) {
              tempDescEl.innerHTML = `<strong>${curTemp} °C</strong> — Valor personalizado definido pelo range.`;
              tempDescEl.style.opacity = '1';
            }
          } else {
            if (tempLabelEl) { tempLabelEl.textContent = '— °C'; tempLabelEl.style.color = 'var(--text-secondary)'; }
            if (tempSubEl) tempSubEl.textContent = 'Deslize ou toque nas setas';
            if (tempDescEl) { tempDescEl.textContent = 'Selecione a temperatura para ver detalhes de uso.'; tempDescEl.style.opacity = '0.7'; }
          }
          // Arrow states (disable if on custom temp)
          if (tempPrev) { tempPrev.style.color = tempIdx <= 0 ? 'var(--border-color)' : 'var(--text-primary)'; tempPrev.disabled = tempIdx <= 0; }
          if (tempNext) { tempNext.style.color = tempIdx >= TEMP_OPTIONS.length - 1 ? 'var(--border-color)' : 'var(--text-primary)'; tempNext.disabled = tempIdx >= TEMP_OPTIONS.length - 1; }
          renderDots();
          // Sync range slider
          const rs = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempRangeSlider');
          const rv = overlay.querySelector('#cfgRangeVal');
          const v = parseFloat(tempEl.value);
          if (rs && isFinite(v)) {
            rs.value = Math.max(-40, Math.min(15, v));
            if (rv) { rv.textContent = `${Math.round(v)} °C`; rv.style.color = rcColorForTemp(v) !== '#e5e7eb' ? rcColorForTemp(v) : 'var(--text-primary)'; }
          }
          liveAnalysis();
        }

        function goTemp(dir) {
          const newIdx = tempIdx + dir;
          if (newIdx < 0 || newIdx >= TEMP_OPTIONS.length) return;
          tempIdx = newIdx;
          updateTempUI(true);
        }

        if (tempPrev) tempPrev.addEventListener('click', () => goTemp(-1));
        if (tempNext) tempNext.addEventListener('click', () => goTemp(1));

        // Swipe support on the slider area
        if (tempSlider) {
          let swipeStartX = 0;
          let swiping = false;
          tempSlider.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
            swipeStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
            swiping = true;
          }, { passive: true });
          tempSlider.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
            if (!swiping) return;
            swiping = false;
            const diff = e.changedTouches[0].clientX - swipeStartX;
            if (Math.abs(diff) > 30) {
              goTemp(diff < 0 ? 1 : -1);
            }
          }, { passive: true });
          // Mouse drag for desktop
          tempSlider.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
            if (e.target.tagName === 'BUTTON') return;
            swipeStartX = e.clientX;
            swiping = true;
          });
          tempSlider.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => {
            if (!swiping) return;
            swiping = false;
            const diff = e.clientX - swipeStartX;
            if (Math.abs(diff) > 30) {
              goTemp(diff < 0 ? 1 : -1);
            }
          });
          tempSlider.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { swiping = false; });
        }

        // Dot click
        if (tempDotsEl) {
          tempDotsEl.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            const dot = e.target;
            const dots = Array.from(tempDotsEl.children);
            const i = dots.indexOf(dot);
            if (i >= 0) { tempIdx = i; updateTempUI(true); }
          });
        }

        // Range slider for custom temperature
        const rangeSlider = overlay.querySelector('#cfgTempRangeSlider');
        if (rangeSlider) {
          rangeSlider.addEventListener('input', () => {
            const v = parseInt(rangeSlider.value);
            tempEl.value = v;
            // Check if it matches a preset
            const matchIdx = TEMP_OPTIONS.findIndex(t => t.v === v);
            tempIdx = matchIdx; // -1 if custom
            updateTempUI(false);
          });
        }

        // Initial render
        updateTempUI(false);
        liveAnalysis();
      }

      function saveCompartmentConfig(compName) {
        const t = document.getElementById('cfgTemp').value;
        const cat = document.getElementById('cfgCategoria').value;
        const kg = document.getElementById('cfgKg').value;
        const finalidade = document.getElementById('cfgFinalidade').value.trim();
        const freq = document.getElementById('cfgFreq').value;
        const lumVal = document.getElementById('cfgLum').value;
        const errs = [];
        if (t === '' || !isFinite(parseFloat(t))) errs.push('Temperatura');
        if (!freq) errs.push('Frequência de aberturas');
        if (lumVal === '' || !isFinite(parseInt(lumVal))) errs.push('Quantidade de luminárias');
        if (errs.length) {
          uiAlert(`Campos obrigatórios não preenchidos: <strong>${errs.join(', ')}</strong>.`, { variant: 'warning' });
          return;
        }
        const tNum = parseFloat(t);
        if (tNum < -40 || tNum > 15) {
          uiAlert('Temperatura fora da faixa de refrigeração. Use um valor entre -40°C e +15°C.', { variant: 'error' });
          return;
        }
        const cfg = rcGetCompartmentsConfig();
        cfg[compName] = {
          temperatura_setpoint: parseFloat(t),
          categoria_produto: cat || '',
          finalidade: finalidade,
          kg_estoque_alvo: kg ? parseFloat(kg) : null,
          frequencia_aberturas: freq,
          empilhadeira: document.getElementById('cfgEmpilh').checked,
          paleteira: document.getElementById('cfgPalet').checked,
          produto_quente: document.getElementById('cfgQuente').checked,
          segmento_critico: document.getElementById('cfgCritico').checked,
          observacoes: document.getElementById('cfgObs').value || '',
          qtd_luminarias: parseInt(lumVal),
        };
        rcSaveCompartmentsConfig(cfg);
        const overlay = document.getElementById('compConfigOverlay');
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
        refreshChamberVisualizer();
        refreshRcSidebar();
        if (typeof window._syncLuminariasTotal === 'function') window._syncLuminariasTotal();
        addChatMessage(`⚙️ Compartimento **${compName}** configurado: ${cfg[compName].temperatura_setpoint}°C${cat ? ' · ' + RC_USO_LABELS[cat] : ''}.`, 'system');
      }

      async function clearCompartmentConfig(compName) {
        if (!(await uiConfirm(`Limpar configuração de ${compName}?`, { danger: true, confirmText: 'Limpar' }))) return;
        const cfg = rcGetCompartmentsConfig();
        delete cfg[compName];
        rcSaveCompartmentsConfig(cfg);
        const overlay = document.getElementById('compConfigOverlay');
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
        refreshChamberVisualizer();
        refreshRcSidebar();
        if (typeof window._syncLuminariasTotal === 'function') window._syncLuminariasTotal();
      }

      // ---- Reality Check inline summary in chat ----
      function renderRcChatSummary(rc, stepNum) {
        const order = { error: 0, warning: 1, info: 2, suggestion: 3 };
        const sorted = [...rc.issues].sort((a, b) => (order[a.level] || 9) - (order[b.level] || 9));
        const fitColor = rc.derived.fit_score >= 90 ? '🟢'
                       : rc.derived.fit_score >= 70 ? '🔵'
                       : rc.derived.fit_score >= 50 ? '🟠' : '🔴';
        let md = `### 📊 Reality Check (cálculo determinístico) — Etapa ${stepNum}\n\n`;
        md += `**Volume Int.:** ${rc.derived.volume_m3 || '—'} m³ · `;
        md += `**Área Piso:** ${rc.derived.area_piso_m2 || '—'} m² · `;
        if (rc.derived.carga_termica) {
          md += `**Carga Térmica:** ${rc.derived.carga_termica.kcal_h} Kcal/h (${rc.derived.carga_termica.kw_termico} kW) · `;
        } else {
          md += `**Carga Térmica:** — (depende de temperatura/Etapa 6) · `;
        }
        md += `**Fit Score:** ${fitColor} ${rc.derived.fit_score}/100\n\n`;

        if (!sorted.length) {
          md += `_✅ Nenhum problema detectado pelos validators determinísticos._\n`;
        } else {
          md += `**Issues detectados** (${rc.counts.error} erros · ${rc.counts.warning} avisos · ${rc.counts.info} info · ${rc.counts.suggestion} sugestões):\n\n`;
          sorted.forEach(it => {
            const icon = it.level === 'error' ? '🔴'
                       : it.level === 'warning' ? '🟠'
                       : it.level === 'info' ? '🔵' : '🟢';
            md += `${icon} **${it.category || '-'}** — ${it.message}\n\n`;
          });
        }
        md += `\n_Cálculos: grade modular 0,28m · PU min mm/temp (15→50, 0→100, -18→150, -25→175, -35→200) · Carga térmica = Volume × Fator(temp) × multiplicadores · Densidade kg/m³ por categoria._`;
        addChatMessage(md, 'system', rc.blocking ? 'has-errors' : (rc.counts.warning ? 'has-issues' : ''));
      }

      // ---- Navegar para Etapa 3 e abrir configuração de compartimento ----
      function goToStep3ForCompartments() {
        if (currentStep !== 3) {
          currentStep = 3;
          renderCurrentStep();
        }
        setTimeout(() => {
          const target = document.querySelector('.chamber-visualizer, [data-chamber-visualizer]')
                       || document.querySelector('.divisoria-list');
          if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
          try {
            const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
            const comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
            const cfg = rcGetCompartmentsConfig();
            const firstNoConfig = comps.find(c => cfg[c.name]?.temperatura_setpoint == null);
            if (firstNoConfig) {
              setTimeout(() => openCompartmentConfig(firstNoConfig.name), 300);
            }
          } catch (e) { /* noop */ }
        }, 200);
      }
      // Legacy alias for old wiring
      function goToStep2ForUso() { return goToStep3ForCompartments(); }

      // ---- Hooks ----
      // Patch saveToStorage so the sidebar refreshes naturally (lightweight debounce)
      let _rcDebounce = null;
      function scheduleRcRefresh() {
        clearTimeout(_rcDebounce);
        _rcDebounce = setTimeout(refreshRcSidebar, 250);
      }
      const _origSaveToStorage = saveToStorage;
      saveToStorage = function() {
        _origSaveToStorage.apply(this, arguments);
        scheduleRcRefresh();
      };

      // Init
      if (typeof lucide !== 'undefined') lucide.createIcons();
      initValidationTracker();
      marked.setOptions({
        breaks: true,
        gfm: true,
        highlight: function (code, lang) {
          try {
            return hljs.highlightAuto(code).value;
          } catch (e) {
            return code;
          }
        },
      });
      checkAuth();
    </script>
  </body>
</html>
